snippet.title: Fanda - NEHA KAKKAR, PARTYTONYT | Official Video
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Mirzapur The Movie | Official Hindi Teaser | Pankaj Tripathi | Ali Fazal | Divyenndu | 4th Sept
snippet.description:
Witness the epic untold story, this September. Get ready for bhaukaal on the big screen. 

Watch #MirzapurTheMovie only in cinemas on 4th September in Hindi & Telugu

аӨҮаӨё аӨёаӨҝаӨӨаӨӮаӨ¬аӨ°, аӨҸаӨ• аӨңаӨјаӨ¬аӨ°аӨҰаӨёаҘҚаӨӨ аӨ…аӨЁаӨ•аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ•аӨ№аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ аӨӯаҘҢаӨ•аӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨӨаҘҲаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨҮаӨҸ аӨ¬аӨЎаӨјаҘҮ аӨӘаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮ аӨӘаӨ° 

#MirzapurTheMovie аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аҘҮаӨӮ 4 аӨёаӨҝаӨӨаӨӮаӨ¬аӨ° аӨёаҘҮ аӨёаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ« аӨёаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨ®аӨҫаӨҳаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖ аӨ”аӨ° аӨӨаҘҮаӨІаҘҒаӨ—аҘҒ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ

Amazon MGM Studios & Excel Entertainment Present

An Excel Entertainment Production
MIRZAPUR THE MOVIE

Releasing only in cinemas in Hindi & Telugu on 4th September 2026

Featuring:
Ali Fazal
Pankaj Tripathi
Divyenndu
Jitendra Kumar
Ravi K
Abhishek B
Rasika Dugal
Mohitt Maalik
Sheeba Chadha
Rajesh Tailang
Pramod Pathak
Shriya Pilgaonkar
Harshita Shekhar Gaur
Shweta Tripathi
Sonal S. Chauhan
Anangsha Biswas
Shaji Choudhary
Satendra Soni
Kulbhushan Kharbanda
Sushant Singh

Directed by: Gurmmeet Singh
Produced by: Ritesh Sidhwani, Farhan Akhtar
Written by: Puneet Krishna
Co-Producers: Kassim Jagmagia, Vishal Ramchandani
Associate Producer: Abbas Raza Khan
Executive Producers: Vishal Bajaj & Pratik Nandkumar More (Shoot At Site)
Director of Photography: Sanjay Kapoor ISC
Production Design: Sonam Singh & Abhijit Gaonkar (Megamind Studio)
Editor: Manan Ashwin Mehta
Sound Design: Vivek Sachidanand
Original Score: John Stewart Eduri
Costume Design: Darshan Jalan & Neelanchal Ghosh
Hair Design, Makeup & Prosthetic Design: Shipra Singh Acharya
Action Director: Amin Khatib
Music Composers: RAY, Junaid Kumar, Anand Bhaskar
Lyrics: Kumaar, Tejpaal Singh Rawwat, Ginny Diwan
VFX Supervisor: Vijay N. Shinde
Director of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly & Khyati Panchmatia
Casting: Anmol Ahuja (Casting Bay)
2nd Unit Director: Saurabh Shukla
Post Producer: Akshay Vaishnav
Head of Post Production: Manoj Chouhan
Production Sound Mixer: Abhishek Tripathy
Chief Financial Officer: Jaswant Singh Hinduja
Financial Advisor: Bimal Parekh & Co
Legal Head: Pooja Sharma
Assistant Vice President Legal: Niti Mayer
Marketing: Nidhi Mehta Marthak, Rhea Wagh & Devang Majethia
Teaser by: Siddheshwar Ekambe
Teaser Music by: John Stewart Eduri
First Assistant Director: Rahull Upadyay
Associate Directors: Rohit Babu, Raghuvanshi Malik
2nd Unit Director of Photography: Arun Damodaran
Post Supervisor: Kinchit Amar Desai
Re-Recording Mixer: Sarath Mohan
Publicity Designers: Rahul Nanda, Himanshu Nanda
Media Consultant: Spice
VFX by: Resonance Digital LLP & Light N Light VFX
Senior Colourist: Rahul Purav
Color by: FutureWorks Media Ltd

Mirzapur The Movie brings the world of power, revenge, and survival to the big screen, as the battle for the throne of Mirzapur reaches a whole new scale.

Hit 'I'm Interested' now for exclusive updates & more, only on BookMyShow.

Lyrics :-

аӨ¬аӨҝаӨҜаӨ°аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨҝаӨёаӨҝ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аӨ®аӨІ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨёаӨҝ 
аӨ¬аӨҝаӨҜаӨ°аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨҝаӨёаӨҝ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аӨ®аӨІ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨёаӨҝ 

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ 
аӨ…аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҲ аӨ«аҘҒаӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘҮаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨҫаӨҲаӨЎ аӨІаӨҫаӨ— 

аӨҳаӨ° аӨӨ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘӢ аӨҜаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨ№аҘҲаӨЁ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҒаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ 
аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨ°аҘҒаӨӘаӨІаҘҮ аӨҸ аӨ•аӨҫаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣаӨҝ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІаҘҲ аӨҡаҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ 
аӨ…аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҲ аӨ«аҘҒаӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘҮаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨҫаӨҲаӨЎ аӨІаӨҫаӨ— 

аӨ®аӨҫаӨҲаӨІаӨҫ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ№аӨңаҘҒаӨ°, аӨ•аҘҮаӨӣ аӨ•аҘҮаӨҹаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ№аӨІаҘҚаӨІаӨҝаӨҡаӨІаҘҚаӨІаҘҖ
аӨ аӨҝаӨ• аӨӣ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҲ, аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ 
аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ ?

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘӮ аӨ–аҘҲ 
аӨӘаӨҫаӨҒаӨҡ аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨ· аӨІаӨӯ аӨӘаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨІаӨ«аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨЎ аӨӘаҘӢаӨҮаӨІ аӨ—аҘҲ 
аӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫ ... аӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫ..
аӨ®аӨҫаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣаҘҮ аӨ¬аҘҢаӨІаӨҫаӨҸаӨёаҘҖ аӨ•аӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨӣ аӨ° аӨ–аҘҲ 

аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁ аӨҶаӨүаӨӣаҘҒ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨҘаҘҖ аӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ•аҘӢаӨ№аӨІаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҡаҘӢаӨ•аӨ®аӨҫ 
аӨҸаӨ• аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаҘҒаӨЁ аӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨёаҘҖ аӨ–аӨҫаӨҸаӨҒ аӨ®аҘҲаӨІаҘҮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨёаӨ•аҘӢ аӨқаҘӢаӨ•аӨ®аӨҫ 

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ 
аӨ…аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҲ аӨ«аҘҒаӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘҮаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨҫаӨҲаӨЎ аӨІаӨҫаӨ— 

аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ - аӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ 
аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ - аӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ 

аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘҲ аӨёаҘҢаӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨӘаӨӣаҘҖ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ® аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ® 
аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘҲ аӨёаҘҢаӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨӘаӨӣаҘҖ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ® аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ®

Lyrics :-

аӨ¬аӨҝаӨҜаӨ°аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨҝаӨёаӨҝ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аӨ®аӨІ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨёаӨҝ 
аӨ¬аӨҝаӨҜаӨ°аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨҝаӨёаӨҝ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аӨ®аӨІ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨёаӨҝ 

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ 
аӨ…аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҲ аӨ«аҘҒаӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘҮаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨҫаӨҲаӨЎ аӨІаӨҫаӨ— 

аӨҳаӨ° аӨӨ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘӢ аӨҜаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨ№аҘҲаӨЁ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҒаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ 
аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨ°аҘҒаӨӘаӨІаҘҮ аӨҸ аӨ•аӨҫаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣаӨҝ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІаҘҲ аӨҡаҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ 
аӨ…аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҲ аӨ«аҘҒаӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘҮаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨҫаӨҲаӨЎ аӨІаӨҫаӨ— 

аӨ®аӨҫаӨҲаӨІаӨҫ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ№аӨңаҘҒаӨ°, аӨ•аҘҮаӨӣ аӨ•аҘҮаӨҹаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ№аӨІаҘҚаӨІаӨҝаӨҡаӨІаҘҚаӨІаҘҖ
аӨ аӨҝаӨ• аӨӣ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҲ, аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ 
аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ ?

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘӮ аӨ–аҘҲ 
аӨӘаӨҫаӨҒаӨҡ аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨ· аӨІаӨӯ аӨӘаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨІаӨ«аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨЎ аӨӘаҘӢаӨҮаӨІ аӨ—аҘҲ 
аӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫ ... аӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫ..
аӨ®аӨҫаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣаҘҮ аӨ¬аҘҢаӨІаӨҫаӨҸаӨёаҘҖ аӨ•аӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨӣ аӨ° аӨ–аҘҲ 

аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁ аӨҶаӨүаӨӣаҘҒ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨҘаҘҖ аӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ•аҘӢаӨ№аӨІаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҡаҘӢаӨ•аӨ®аӨҫ 
аӨҸаӨ• аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаҘҒаӨЁ аӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨёаҘҖ аӨ–аӨҫаӨҸаӨҒ аӨ®аҘҲаӨІаҘҮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨёаӨ•аҘӢ аӨқаҘӢаӨ•аӨ®аӨҫ 

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ 
аӨ…аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҲ аӨ«аҘҒаӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘҮаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨҫаӨҲаӨЎ аӨІаӨҫаӨ— 

аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ - аӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ 
аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ - аӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ 

аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘҲ аӨёаҘҢаӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨӘаӨӣаҘҖ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ® аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ® 
аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘҲ аӨёаҘҢаӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨӘаӨӣаҘҖ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ® аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ®

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of вҖңALPHAвҖқ

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

в–ә Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY рҹ”” Stay updated!
в–ә YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan

Stay in the filmy loop:
в–ә Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
в–ә Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
в–ә Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
в–ә Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinemaвҖҷs first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

snippet.title: Bandhu 2.0 | Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika| Pritam | Kavita | Neeraj | Irshad K | Cocktail 2 | 19th June
snippet.description:
Tumhi din chadhe, tumhi din dhale,
Tumhi ho bandhu, sakha tumhi! рҹ’ғ

Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna are back with вҖҳBandhu 2.0вҖҷ from вҖҳCocktail 2вҖҷ! Composed by Pritam, penned by Irshad Kamil and sung by Kavita Seth and Neeraj Shridhar, get ready to get back in time and groove with it!

#Bandhu2.0 #Cocktail2 #ShahidKapoor #KritiSanon #RashmikaMandanna 

рҹҺ§ Song Credits 
Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon & Rashmika Mandanna 
Directed by : Amar Kaushik
Singer: Kavita Sheth and Neeraj Shridhar
Music Composer: Pritam Chakraborty 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil
Mixed and Mastered by - Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay
Assistant to Eric Pillai - Michael Edwin Pillai

#Cocktail2, releasing in cinemas on 19th June 2026

рҹҺ¬ Video Credits
Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna
Directed By: Homi Adajania 
Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, Pramita R Vijan and Ankur Garg 
Written By: Tarun Jain and Luv Ranjan
Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja
Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
Director of Choreography: Jaani Master
Publicity Design: Himanshu & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

Yaara tere sadke
Ishq sikha main toh aayi jag tajh ke
Ishq sikha
Main toh yaara tere sadke
Main toh aayi jag tajh ke
Ishq sikha
Jab yaar kare parwah meri
Mujhe kya parwah iss duniya ki
Jag mujhpe lagaaye pabandhi
Main hoon hi nahi iss duniya ki
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi

Sakha tumhi

Tumhi din dhale

Sakha tumhi

Ishqan ishqan
Jag kya jaane dil ko mere
Ishqan kiska

Ishqan ishqan

Ishqan kiska

snippet.title: SAATO RE BAHINIYA I аӨёаӨҫаӨӨаҘӢ аӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨ№аӨҝаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ I OFFICIAL TRAILER I YAMINI SINGH I NEW BHOJPURI MOVIE
snippet.description:
#yaminisingh #ladomadhesiya #saatorebahiniya #trailer #trending #bhojpurimovie 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH GEETA TIWARI PRODUCTION & MADHU MANJUL ARTS

аҘһаӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® вҖ“ аӨёаӨҫаӨӨаҘӢ аӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨ№аӨҝаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ (аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® )
аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аӨҝаӨЁаҘҖ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  аӨӢаӨӨаҘӮ  аӨҡаҘҢаӨ№аӨҫаӨЁ , аӨёаҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨҹаӨҝ  аӨӘаӨҫаӨ аӨ• , аӨЁаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ  аӨ®аҘҢаӨ°аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ  аӨёаҘӢаӨЁаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ  аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ  , аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҒаӨІ  аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ , аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘаӨҫ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨІаӨҫаӨЎаҘӢ  аӨ®аӨ§аҘҮаӨёаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ  аӨӯаҘӮаӨӘаҘҮаӨӮаӨҰаҘҚаӨ°  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ®  аӨҰаҘҒаӨ¬аҘҮ  , аӨӘаҘҒаӨ·аҘҚаӨӘаҘҮаӨӮаӨҰаҘҚаӨ°  аӨ°аӨҫаӨҜ , аӨёаҘҚаӨөаҘҖаӨҹаҘҖ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨүаӨ®аӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨ  аӨ°аӨҫаӨҜ  аӨ…аӨ¶аҘӢаӨ• аӨ—аҘҒаӨӘаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ, аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҘ  аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ  
аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°  вҖ“ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨӨ  аӨ°аӨҫаӨң & аӨҜаӨ¶
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ• вҖ“ аӨ•аҘҒаӨЈаӨҫаӨІ  аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ  
аӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҮаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№
аӨІаҘҮаӨ–аӨ• - аӨёаӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаҘҮаӨӮаӨҰаҘҚаӨ° аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№

аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аӨҝаӨЁаҘҖ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  аӨӢаӨӨаҘӮ  аӨҡаҘҢаӨ№аӨҫаӨЁ , аӨёаҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨҹаӨҝ  аӨӘаӨҫаӨ аӨ• , аӨЁаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ  аӨ®аҘҢаӨ°аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ  аӨёаҘӢаӨЁаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ  аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ  , аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҒаӨІ  аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ , аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘаӨҫ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨІаӨҫаӨЎаҘӢ  аӨ®аӨ§аҘҮаӨёаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ  аӨӯаҘӮаӨӘаҘҮаӨӮаӨҰаҘҚаӨ°  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ®  аӨҰаҘҒаӨ¬аҘҮ  , аӨӘаҘҒаӨ·аҘҚаӨӘаҘҮаӨӮаӨҰаҘҚаӨ°  аӨ°аӨҫаӨҜ , аӨёаҘҚаӨөаҘҖаӨҹаҘҖ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨүаӨ®аӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨ  аӨ°аӨҫаӨҜ  аӨ…аӨ¶аҘӢаӨ• аӨ—аҘҒаӨӘаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ, аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҘ  аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ  
аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°  вҖ“ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨӨ  аӨ°аӨҫаӨң & аӨҜаӨ¶
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ• вҖ“ аӨ•аҘҒаӨЈаӨҫаӨІ  аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ  
аӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҮаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№
аӨІаҘҮаӨ–аӨ• - аӨёаӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаҘҮаӨӮаӨҰаҘҚаӨ° аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№
аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°-  аӨёаӨҫаӨңаӨЁ аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ
аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨІаӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө
аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аӨІаӨЁ - аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨӨаӨ® аӨЁаӨҫаӨҜаӨ•
аӨӘаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ - аӨІаҘӢаӨҹаӨё аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘӮаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ
аӨӣаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аӨЁ- аӨЁаӨҫаӨ—аҘҮаӨӮаӨҰаҘҚаӨ° аӨ•аҘҒаӨ®аӨҫаӨ°
аӨ•аҘӢаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨ«аӨ° вҖ“ аӨёаҘҒаӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ®аӨҝаӨӮаӨң
аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨЎаӨҫаӨҜаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаӨ° вҖ“ аӨ°аӨҫаӨңаӨҫ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨ§аҘҖаӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаҘҚаӨ° аӨ•аҘҒаӨ®аӨҫаӨ° аӨқаӨҫ аӨө аӨ•аҘҒаӨЈаӨҫаӨІ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ
аӨ®аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨҝаӨ• вҖ“ IVY MUSIC
аӨёаҘ…аӨҹаҘ…аӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨЁаӨ° - B4U аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ

B4U аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҸаӨҹаӨҝаӨө аӨҹаҘҖаӨ® вҖ“ 
аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҒаӨҰ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨЁаҘҮаӨ№аӨҫ аӨүаӨӘаӨҫаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҜ , аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө


B4U аӨІаҘҖаӨ—аӨІ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЈаӨҫ , аӨӨаҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаӨҫ аӨӘаӨҹаҘҮаӨІ , аӨӘаҘӮаӨЁаӨ® аӨ¶аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҮ , аӨҶаӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨөаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢаӨЎаҘҮ вҖ“ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮ
аӨ‘аӨ«аӨҝаӨё аӨ¬аҘүаӨҜ - аӨ•аӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аҘҲаӨҜаӨҫ

IVY вҖ“ аӨҸаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аӨҹаҘҮаӨЁаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ -  аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё  

аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ—аӨҫ , аӨңаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨё , аӨөаӨҝаӨӘаҘҒаӨІ аӨңаҘҲаӨЁ , аӨЁаӨҝаӨөаҘғаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҹаӨҝаӨІ , , аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ¶аҘҒ аӨҡаҘҢаӨ§аӨ°аҘҖ

B4U - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё

аӨёаӨӮаӨӨаҘӢаӨ· аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨ— , аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨІаҘҚаӨөаҘҖ ,

snippet.title: Aaj Kehna Zaroori Hai вқӨпёҸ | Andaaz | Romantic Bollywood Song
snippet.description:
"Aaj Kehna Zaroori Hai" from the blockbuster movie ****. Beautifully sung by Udit Narayan and Alka Yagnik, this romantic duet captures the joy of expressing love and emotions from the heart.

Featuring Akshay Kumar and Lara Dutta, the song remains one of the most loved romantic tracks from the golden era of Bollywood music.

Movie: Andaaz (2003)
Song: Aaj Kehna Zaroori Hai
Featuring: Akshay Kumar, Lara Dutta 
Singers: Alka Yagnik, Udit Narayan
Music: Nadeem Shravan
Lyrics: Sameer
Produced by: Shree Krishna International/Suneel Darshan

Lyrics:
аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨҶ аӨҶ аӨҶ аӨҶ
аӨҶаӨң аӨ•аӨ№аӨЁаӨҫ аӨңаӨјаӨ°аҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨҶаӨң аӨ•аӨ№аӨЁаӨҫ аӨңаӨјаӨ°аҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ

"Aaj Kehna Zaroori Hai" from the blockbuster movie ****. Beautifully sung by Udit Narayan and Alka Yagnik, this romantic duet captures the joy of expressing love and emotions from the heart.

Featuring Akshay Kumar and Lara Dutta, the song remains one of the most loved romantic tracks from the golden era of Bollywood music.

Movie: Andaaz (2003)
Song: Aaj Kehna Zaroori Hai
Featuring: Akshay Kumar, Lara Dutta 
Singers: Alka Yagnik, Udit Narayan
Music: Nadeem Shravan
Lyrics: Sameer
Produced by: Shree Krishna International/Suneel Darshan

Lyrics:
аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨҶ аӨҶ аӨҶ аӨҶ
аӨҶаӨң аӨ•аӨ№аӨЁаӨҫ аӨңаӨјаӨ°аҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨҶаӨң аӨ•аӨ№аӨЁаӨҫ аӨңаӨјаӨ°аҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ¬аӨЎаӨјаҘҖ аӨ®аҘҒаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ•аӨҝаӨІ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨҰаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ¬аӨЎаӨјаҘҖ аӨ®аҘҒаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ•аӨҝаӨІ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨҰаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨӨаҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ…аӨӮаӨҰаӨҫаӨңаӨј аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ
аӨӣаҘҒаӨӘаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ¬аӨ°аӨёаҘӢаӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨ°аӨҫаӨңаӨј аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨӨаҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ…аӨӮаӨҰаӨҫаӨңаӨј аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ
аӨӣаҘҒаӨӘаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ¬аӨ°аӨёаҘӢаӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨ°аӨҫаӨңаӨј аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ
аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӨаҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аӨ°аҘӮаӨҒ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨ¶аӨҫ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ
аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ¬аҘҮаӨ•аӨјаӨ°аӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ
аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ№аӨ° аӨӘаӨІ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ№аӨ° аӨӘаӨІ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ¬аӨЎаӨјаҘҖ аӨ®аҘҒаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ•аӨҝаӨІ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨҰаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ¬аӨЎаӨјаҘҖ аӨ®аҘҒаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ•аӨҝаӨІ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨҰаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨңаӨјаӨ®аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаҘҖаӨӣаҘҮ аӨ•аӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨӣаҘӢаӨЎаӨј аӨҰаҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аӨ®
аӨҡаӨІаҘӢ аӨҶаӨң аӨёаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аӨҰаҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘӢаӨЎаӨј аӨҰаҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аӨ®
аӨңаӨјаӨ®аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаҘҖаӨӣаҘҮ аӨ•аӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨӣаҘӢаӨЎаӨј аӨҰаҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аӨ®
аӨҡаӨІаҘӢ аӨҶаӨң аӨёаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аӨҰаҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘӢаӨЎаӨј аӨҰаҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аӨ®
аӨёаӨЁаӨ® аӨҶаӨ¶аӨҝаӨ•аӨјаҘҖ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҲаӨёаӨҫ аӨ…аӨёаӨ° аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨҶ аӨ—аӨҸ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ–аӨ¬аӨ° аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨё аӨӨаҘҒаӨ® аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁ аӨ…аӨ§аҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨё аӨӨаҘҒаӨ® аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁ аӨ…аӨ§аҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨҶаӨң аӨ•аӨ№аӨЁаӨҫ аӨңаӨјаӨ°аҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨҶаӨң аӨ•аӨ№аӨЁаӨҫ аӨңаӨјаӨ°аҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ¬аӨЎаӨјаҘҖ аӨ®аҘҒаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ•аӨҝаӨІ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨҰаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ¬аӨЎаӨјаҘҖ аӨ®аҘҒаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ•аӨҝаӨІ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨҰаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨҶ аӨ№аӨҫ аӨҶ аӨ№аӨҫ аӨҶ аӨ№аӨҫ аӨҶ аӨ№аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҮ

Enjoy this evergreen romantic classic and relive the magic of Bollywood melodies

snippet.description:

STEALING THE WORLD'S FASTEST CAR | GTA IN REAL LIFE | MUMBAI HEIST

Welcome to an action-packed GTA IN REAL LIFE adventure!

In this video, we plan the biggest Mumbai heist and attempt to steal the world's fastest car. Expect thrilling action, cinematic scenes, car chases, suspense, and entertainment from start to finish.

Disclaimer:
This film is a work of fiction created for entertainment purposes. Any resemblance to actual persons, living or dead, businesses, organizations, events, locations, or incidents is purely coincidental and unintentional.
The film is inspired by the open-world gaming genre and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with any third-party intellectual property owners.
All driving sequences, action scenes and stunts depicted in this film were performed by trained professionals under controlled conditions with appropriate safety measures in place. Please do not attempt to recreate or imitate any of the actions shown in this film.

snippet.title: 9th Anniversary Animation Trailer аҰҸаҰёа§Ү аҰ—а§ҮаҰӣа§Ү! рҹҺү
snippet.description:
9th Anniversary Animation Trailer аҰҸаҰёа§Ү аҰ—а§ҮаҰӣа§Ү! рҹҺү

Free Fire-аҰҸаҰ° а§ҜаҰ® аҰңаҰЁа§ҚаҰ®аҰҰаҰҝаҰЁ аҰҸаҰ•аҰҰаҰ® аҰ•аҰҫаҰӣа§ҮаҰҮ, аҰҶаҰ° аҰҸаҰ¬аҰҫаҰ° аҰңа§ҮаҰ—а§Ү аҰүаҰ аҰӨа§Ү аҰҜаҰҫаҰҡа§ҚаҰӣа§Ү аҰЁаҰӨа§ҒаҰЁ аҰҸаҰ• аҰ¶аҰ•а§ҚаҰӨаҰҝ... рҹ‘Җ

аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰёа§ҚаҰӨа§ҒаҰӨ аҰ№а§ӢаҰЁ аҰЁаҰӨа§ҒаҰЁ аҰёа§ҚаҰ•аҰҝаҰІ, аҰЁаҰӨа§ҒаҰЁ аҰ•аҰ®аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҹ аҰёаҰ®а§ҚаҰӯаҰҫаҰ¬аҰЁаҰҫ аҰҶаҰ° аҰҶаҰ°аҰ“ аҰ¶аҰ•а§ҚаҰӨаҰҝаҰ¶аҰҫаҰІа§Җ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҹа§ҮаҰІа§ҮаҰ° аҰңаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҘӨ рҹ”Ҙ

аҰҶаҰӘаҰЁаҰҝ аҰ•а§ӢаҰЁ аҰ§аҰ°аҰЁа§ҮаҰ° аҰёа§ҚаҰ•аҰҝаҰІ аҰҶаҰӘаҰ—а§ҚаҰ°а§ҮаҰЎ аҰҰа§ҮаҰ–аҰӨа§Ү аҰҡаҰҫаҰЁ?

аҰёаҰҫаҰҘа§ҮаҰҮ аҰҘаҰҫаҰ•а§ҒаҰЁ Full Animation аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ 9th Anniversary-аҰҸаҰ° аҰҶаҰ°аҰ“ аҰҡаҰ®аҰ•а§ҮаҰ° аҰңаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҘӨ

#FreeFire9 #FreeFire9thAnniversary #Booyah

snippet.title: Mirzapur The Movie Teaser REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Mirzapur The Movie Teaser Review by Deeksha Sharma. Pankaj Tripathi with Ali Fazal & Divyenndu is back with Mirzapur Universe in the same timeline but with new Storytelling Old Rivalry & New Surprises, Violence To The Next Level with Hook Crook Grey Shade Character- Mirzapur the Movie will challenge Rocking Star Yash Toxic & Shraddha Kapoor Eetha at bollywood box office collection numbers. Mirzapur Teaser Reaction & Full Movie Trailer Expectations would be shared in this Video. Can Munna Bhaiya Save the Franchise One More time? Do leave Comments below.

#MirzapurTheMovie #MirzapurTheMovieTeaser #MirzapurTeaser

snippet.title: Katar Katarma - Mahesh Kafle & Asmita Adhikari | Nischal Basnet | Official Remake Music Video
snippet.description:
Presenting the official music video for "Katar Katarma," a brilliant new remake track performed by the hit duo Mahesh Kafle and Asmita Adhikari. Featuring an exceptional performance by Nischal Basnet, Loonibha Tuladhar and  Rachana Neupane, this upbeat and energetic Nepali song blends infectious rhythms with a lively story. snippet.title: SAWLA BATEU ( Official Video ) Armaan Malik | Anjali 99 | Chirayu, Ayaan, Zaid, Tuba
snippet.description:
Disclaimer :- аӨҮаӨё аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҰаӨҝаӨ–аӨҫаӨҸ аӨ—аӨҸ аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨҰаҘғаӨ¶аҘҚаӨҜ, аӨӘаӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ”аӨ° аӨҳаӨҹаӨЁаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӨаӨ°аӨ№ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫаӨІаҘҚаӨӘаӨЁаӨҝаӨ• аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ
аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аӨҫ аӨүаӨҰаҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аҘҚаӨҜ аӨ•аҘҮаӨөаӨІ аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ®аӨЁаҘӢаӨ°аӨӮаӨңаӨЁ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ®аӨ•аӨёаӨҰ аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨёаӨ®аҘҒаӨҰаӨҫаӨҜ, аӨёаӨӮаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘғаӨӨаӨҝ, аӨӘаӨ°аӨӮаӨӘаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨӯаӨҫаӨөаӨЁаӨҫаӨ“аӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ аҘҮаӨё аӨӘаӨ№аҘҒаӨӮаӨҡаӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ Malik Family  аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ  India аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨөаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ№ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ–аӨҝаӨІаӨҫаӨ« аӨ№аҘҲ,
аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨөаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ№ аӨҸаӨ• аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫаӨңаӨҝаӨ• аӨ¬аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ•аӨҫаӨЁаҘӮаӨЁаӨЁ аӨ…аӨӘаӨ°аӨҫаӨ§ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аҘҮаӨөаӨІ аӨ®аӨЁаҘӢаӨӮаӨ°аӨңаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ—аӨҜаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨ№аӨ® аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҒаӨ°аҘӢаӨ§ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨөаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ№ аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҒаӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҘаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨөаӨҝаӨ°аҘӢаӨ§ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ
аӨӨаӨҘаӨҫ аӨ¬аӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¶аӨҝаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ, аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨёаҘҚаӨҘаҘҚаӨҜ аӨ”аӨ° аӨүаӨңаҘҚаӨңаҘҚаӨөаӨІ аӨӯаӨөаӨҝаӨ·аҘҚаӨҜ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ…аӨ§аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨҰаӨҝаӨІаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨёаӨ№аӨҜаҘӢаӨ— аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ
аӨҮаӨё аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аӨЁ (Shooting) аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаҘҢаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁ аӨҮаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҮаӨ®аӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҸ аӨ—аӨҸ аӨҳаҘӢаӨЎаӨјаҘҮ (аӨӘаӨ¶аҘҒ) аӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаҘҒаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨӯаӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ°аӨ–аӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¶аҘӮаӨҹаӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаҘҢаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁ аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаӨөаӨ° аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨЁаҘҒаӨ•аӨёаӨҫаӨЁ, аӨҡаҘӢаӨҹ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҫаӨЎаӨјаӨҝаӨӨ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨаӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨҰаҘғаӨ¶аҘҚаӨҜ аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҮаӨ·аӨңаҘҚаӨһаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨ°аҘҮаӨ– аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаҘҒаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ№аҘҢаӨІ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨҸ аӨ—аӨҸ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ

аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¶аҘӮаӨҹаӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӨаӨ°аӨ№ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ-аӨӘаӨҝаӨӨаӨҫ/аӨ…аӨӯаӨҝаӨӯаӨҫаӨөаӨ•аҘӢаӨӮ (Parents/Guardians) аӨ•аҘҖ аӨүаӨӘаӨёаҘҚаӨҘаӨҝаӨӨаӨҝ, аӨүаӨЁаӨ•аҘҖ аӨІаӨҝаӨ–аӨҝаӨӨ аӨёаӨ№аӨ®аӨӨаӨҝ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаҘҒаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ№аҘҢаӨІ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ—аӨҲ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

Disclaimer :- аӨҮаӨё аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҰаӨҝаӨ–аӨҫаӨҸ аӨ—аӨҸ аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨҰаҘғаӨ¶аҘҚаӨҜ, аӨӘаӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ”аӨ° аӨҳаӨҹаӨЁаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӨаӨ°аӨ№ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫаӨІаҘҚаӨӘаӨЁаӨҝаӨ• аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ
аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аӨҫ аӨүаӨҰаҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аҘҚаӨҜ аӨ•аҘҮаӨөаӨІ аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ®аӨЁаҘӢаӨ°аӨӮаӨңаӨЁ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ®аӨ•аӨёаӨҰ аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨёаӨ®аҘҒаӨҰаӨҫаӨҜ, аӨёаӨӮаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘғаӨӨаӨҝ, аӨӘаӨ°аӨӮаӨӘаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨӯаӨҫаӨөаӨЁаӨҫаӨ“аӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ аҘҮаӨё аӨӘаӨ№аҘҒаӨӮаӨҡаӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ Malik Family  аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ  India аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨөаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ№ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ–аӨҝаӨІаӨҫаӨ« аӨ№аҘҲ,
аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨөаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ№ аӨҸаӨ• аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫаӨңаӨҝаӨ• аӨ¬аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ•аӨҫаӨЁаҘӮаӨЁаӨЁ аӨ…аӨӘаӨ°аӨҫаӨ§ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аҘҮаӨөаӨІ аӨ®аӨЁаҘӢаӨӮаӨ°аӨңаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ—аӨҜаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨ№аӨ® аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҒаӨ°аҘӢаӨ§ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨөаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ№ аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҒаӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҘаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨөаӨҝаӨ°аҘӢаӨ§ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ
аӨӨаӨҘаӨҫ аӨ¬аӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¶аӨҝаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ, аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨёаҘҚаӨҘаҘҚаӨҜ аӨ”аӨ° аӨүаӨңаҘҚаӨңаҘҚаӨөаӨІ аӨӯаӨөаӨҝаӨ·аҘҚаӨҜ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ…аӨ§аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨҰаӨҝаӨІаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨёаӨ№аӨҜаҘӢаӨ— аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ
аӨҮаӨё аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аӨЁ (Shooting) аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаҘҢаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁ аӨҮаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҮаӨ®аӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҸ аӨ—аӨҸ аӨҳаҘӢаӨЎаӨјаҘҮ (аӨӘаӨ¶аҘҒ) аӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаҘҒаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨӯаӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ°аӨ–аӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¶аҘӮаӨҹаӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаҘҢаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁ аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаӨөаӨ° аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨЁаҘҒаӨ•аӨёаӨҫаӨЁ, аӨҡаҘӢаӨҹ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҫаӨЎаӨјаӨҝаӨӨ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨаӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨҰаҘғаӨ¶аҘҚаӨҜ аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҮаӨ·аӨңаҘҚаӨһаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨ°аҘҮаӨ– аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаҘҒаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ№аҘҢаӨІ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨҸ аӨ—аӨҸ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ
аӨҮаӨё аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӣаҘӢаӨҹаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аӨӮаӨӘаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•/аӨ¶аӨҫаӨҰаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӘаҘӢаӨ¶аӨҫаӨ• (Festive/Traditional Attire) аӨ•аҘҮаӨөаӨІ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨ• аӨҘаҘҖаӨ® аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘғаӨӨаӨҝаӨ• аӨ…аӨӯаӨҝаӨЁаӨҜ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ№аӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӘаӨ№аӨЁаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ—аӨҲ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨ№аӨҫаӨүаӨё аӨ”аӨ° аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨөаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ№ (Child Marriage) аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҖ аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫаӨңаӨҝаӨ• аӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аҘҖаӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ•аӨЎаӨјаӨҫ аӨөаӨҝаӨ°аҘӢаӨ§ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аӨҫ аӨёаӨ®аӨ°аҘҚаӨҘаӨЁ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ
аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¶аҘӮаӨҹаӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӨаӨ°аӨ№ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ-аӨӘаӨҝаӨӨаӨҫ/аӨ…аӨӯаӨҝаӨӯаӨҫаӨөаӨ•аҘӢаӨӮ (Parents/Guardians) аӨ•аҘҖ аӨүаӨӘаӨёаҘҚаӨҘаӨҝаӨӨаӨҝ, аӨүаӨЁаӨ•аҘҖ аӨІаӨҝаӨ–аӨҝаӨӨ аӨёаӨ№аӨ®аӨӨаӨҝ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаҘҒаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ№аҘҢаӨІ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ—аӨҲ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаҘҢаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁ аӨ¬аӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ®аӨҫаӨЁаӨёаӨҝаӨ• аӨ”аӨ° аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ°аҘҖаӨ°аӨҝаӨ• аӨёаҘҒаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ°аӨ–аӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ


Number 1 Records & Armaan Malik Presents New song " SAWLA BATEU "
Make a reel on this sound:-  

Song:-  SAWLA BATEU 
Staring:- Armaan Malik, Payal Malik, Kritika Malik, Chirayu, Zaid, Ayaan, Tuba , Navya Ramavat
Singer:- Armaan Malik, Anjali 99, Vinod Sorkhi
Lyrics & Composer:- Rohit Malik
Director:- Armaan Malik
Music:- Vikash Haryanvi
Producer:- Armaan Malik
Choreographer :- ADDY
Label:- Number 1 Records

#armaanmalik #payalmalik #kritikamalik 
 #zaidayaantuba

аҰҰа§ҚаҰҜаҰӘаҰҝаҰңа§Ү (thePJ) аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ“аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰ¬ аҰҡа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁа§ҮаҰІ, аҰҜаҰҫаҰ° аҰүаҰҰа§ҚаҰҰа§ҮаҰ¶а§ҚаҰҜ аҰ№аҰІа§Ӣ аҰҡаҰІаҰҡа§ҚаҰҡаҰҝаҰӨа§ҚаҰ° аҰӘаҰ°а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰІа§ӢаҰҡаҰЁаҰҫ, аҰёаҰҫаҰ•а§ҚаҰ·аҰҫа§ҺаҰ•аҰҫаҰ°, аҰҶаҰІа§ӢаҰҡаҰЁаҰҫ, аҰӯаҰҝаҰЎаҰҝаҰ“ аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰ¬аҰЁа§ҚаҰ§ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰ¬аҰҝаҰ¶а§ҚаҰІа§ҮаҰ·аҰЈаҰ§аҰ°а§ҚаҰ®а§Җ аҰёаҰӮаҰ•аҰІаҰЁа§ҮаҰ° аҰ®аҰҫаҰ§а§ҚаҰҜаҰ®а§Ү аҰёаҰҝаҰЁа§ҮаҰ®аҰҫаҰ° аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰҡаҰҫаҰ° аҰ•аҰ°аҰҫаҘӨ аҰҸаҰ° аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰ§аҰҫаҰЁ аҰүаҰҰа§ҚаҰҰа§ҮаҰ¶а§ҚаҰҜ аҰ№аҰІа§Ӣ аҰёаҰҝаҰЁа§ҮаҰ®аҰҫ аҰЁаҰҝаҰҜаҰја§Ү аҰӨаҰҘа§ҚаҰҜаҰёаҰ®а§ғаҰҰа§ҚаҰ§ аҰҶаҰІа§ӢаҰҡаҰЁаҰҫ, аҰёаҰ®аҰҫаҰІа§ӢаҰҡаҰЁаҰҫ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰӘаҰ°а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰІа§ӢаҰҡаҰЁаҰҫаҰ•а§Ү аҰүа§ҺаҰёаҰҫаҰ№аҰҝаҰӨ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҫ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰҸаҰҮ аҰІаҰ•а§ҚаҰ·а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰ·а§ҚаҰ аҰҫаҰЁаҰ—а§ҒаҰІа§ӢаҰӨа§Ү аҰҡаҰІаҰҡа§ҚаҰҡаҰҝаҰӨа§ҚаҰ°, аҰ¶аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҰ аҰ°а§ҮаҰ•аҰ°а§ҚаҰЎаҰҝаҰӮ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰҶаҰІа§ӢаҰ•аҰҡаҰҝаҰӨа§ҚаҰ°а§ҮаҰ° аҰёаҰӮаҰ•а§ҚаҰ·аҰҝаҰӘа§ҚаҰӨ аҰ…аҰӮаҰ¶ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ° аҰ•аҰ°аҰҫ аҰ№аҰҜаҰјаҘӨ аҰҸаҰҮ аҰ•а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰӘ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰ…аҰӮаҰ¶аҰ¬аҰҝаҰ¶а§ҮаҰ·аҰ—а§ҒаҰІа§Ӣ аҰ–а§ҒаҰ¬аҰҮ аҰёаҰҫаҰ®аҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰҸаҰ° аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ° аҰ•аҰӘаҰҝаҰ°аҰҫаҰҮаҰҹа§ҮаҰ° аҰ®аҰҫаҰІаҰҝаҰ•аҰҰа§ҮаҰ° аҰҰа§ҚаҰ¬аҰҫаҰ°аҰҫ аҰёаҰ®а§ҚаҰӘа§ӮаҰ°а§ҚаҰЈ аҰ•аҰҫаҰңаҰҹаҰҝаҰ° аҰ¬аҰҫаҰЈаҰҝаҰңа§ҚаҰҜаҰҝаҰ• аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ°а§Ү аҰ•а§ӢаҰЁа§ӢаҰӯаҰҫаҰ¬а§ҮаҰҮ аҰ№аҰёа§ҚаҰӨаҰ•а§ҚаҰ·а§ҮаҰӘ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҫаҰ° аҰүаҰҰа§ҚаҰҰа§ҮаҰ¶а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү аҰЁаҰҜаҰјаҘӨ аҰ•аҰҫаҰңаҰ—а§ҒаҰІа§ӢаҰ° аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ° аҰ•аҰӘаҰҝаҰ°аҰҫаҰҮаҰҹ аҰҶаҰҮаҰЁа§ҮаҰ° а§«а§Ё аҰ§аҰҫаҰ°аҰҫаҰ° аҰ…аҰ§а§ҖаҰЁа§Ү аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰҰаҰӨа§ҚаҰӨ аҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜа§ҚаҰҜ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҰ° аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰӨаҰҝаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰ®а§ҮаҰ° аҰёаҰҫаҰҘа§Ү аҰёаҰҷа§ҚаҰ—аҰӨаҰҝаҰӘа§ӮаҰ°а§ҚаҰЈ, аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰҶаҰ®аҰ°аҰҫ аҰёаҰ®аҰҫаҰІа§ӢаҰҡаҰЁаҰҫ аҰ“ аҰӘаҰ°а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰІа§ӢаҰҡаҰЁаҰҫаҰ° аҰңаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜ аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰҰаҰӨа§ҚаҰӨ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰӨаҰҝаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰ®а§ҮаҰ° аҰ…аҰ§а§ҖаҰЁа§Ү аҰ•аҰҫаҰңаҰ—а§ҒаҰІа§Ӣ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҰ° аҰҰаҰҫаҰ¬аҰҝ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҝаҘӨ

аҰҰаҰҫаҰ¬аҰҝаҰӨа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰ—: - аҰҸаҰҮ аҰҡа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁа§ҮаҰІ аҰ•а§ӢаҰЁа§Ӣ аҰ…аҰ¬а§ҲаҰ§ аҰ•аҰҫаҰ°а§ҚаҰҜаҰ•аҰІаҰҫаҰӘаҰ•а§Ү аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰҡаҰҫаҰ° аҰ¬аҰҫ аҰүа§ҺаҰёаҰҫаҰ№аҰҝаҰӨ аҰ•аҰ°а§Ү аҰЁаҰҫаҘӨ аҰҸаҰҮ аҰҡа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁа§ҮаҰІа§ҮаҰ° аҰёаҰ®аҰёа§ҚаҰӨ аҰ¬аҰҝаҰ·аҰҜаҰјаҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰӨа§Ғ аҰ¶а§ҒаҰ§а§ҒаҰ®аҰҫаҰӨа§ҚаҰ° аҰ¶аҰҝаҰ•а§ҚаҰ·аҰҫаҰ®а§ӮаҰІаҰ• аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰӨаҰҘа§ҚаҰҜаҰ®а§ӮаҰІаҰ• аҰүаҰҰа§ҚаҰҰа§ҮаҰ¶а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү аҰӨа§ҲаҰ°аҰҝаҘӨ 

аҰ•аҰӘаҰҝаҰ°аҰҫаҰҮаҰҹ аҰҰаҰҫаҰ¬аҰҝаҰӨа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰ—: - аҰ•аҰӘаҰҝаҰ°аҰҫаҰҮаҰҹ аҰҶаҰҮаҰЁ а§§а§Ҝа§ӯа§¬-аҰҸаҰ° а§§а§Ұа§ӯ аҰ§аҰҫаҰ°аҰҫ аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜаҰја§Җ, аҰёаҰ®аҰҫаҰІа§ӢаҰҡаҰЁаҰҫ, аҰ®аҰЁа§ҚаҰӨаҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜ, аҰёаҰӮаҰ¬аҰҫаҰҰ аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰӨаҰҝаҰ¬а§ҮаҰҰаҰЁ, аҰ¶аҰҝаҰ•а§ҚаҰ·аҰҫаҰҰаҰҫаҰЁ, аҰ¬а§ғаҰӨа§ҚаҰӨаҰҝ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰ—аҰ¬а§ҮаҰ·аҰЈаҰҫаҰ° аҰ®аҰӨа§Ӣ аҰүаҰҰа§ҚаҰҰа§ҮаҰ¶а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү аҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜа§ҚаҰҜ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҰ° (FAIR USE) аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰ®аҰӨаҰҝ аҰҰа§ҮаҰ“аҰҜаҰјаҰҫ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣа§ҮаҘӨ аҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜа§ҚаҰҜ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ° аҰ№аҰІа§Ӣ аҰ•аҰӘаҰҝаҰ°аҰҫаҰҮаҰҹ аҰҶаҰҮаҰЁ аҰҰа§ҚаҰ¬аҰҫаҰ°аҰҫ аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰ®а§ӢаҰҰаҰҝаҰӨ аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ°, аҰҜаҰҫ аҰ…аҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҘаҰҫаҰҜаҰј аҰІаҰҷа§ҚаҰҳаҰЁаҰ•аҰҫаҰ°а§Җ аҰ№аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҘӨ аҰ…аҰІаҰҫаҰӯаҰңаҰЁаҰ•, аҰ¶аҰҝаҰ•а§ҚаҰ·аҰҫаҰ®а§ӮаҰІаҰ• аҰ¬аҰҫ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ•а§ҚаҰӨаҰҝаҰ—аҰӨ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ° аҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜа§ҚаҰҜ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҰ° аҰӘаҰ•а§ҚаҰ·а§Ү аҰӯаҰҫаҰ°аҰёаҰҫаҰ®а§ҚаҰҜ аҰ°аҰ•а§ҚаҰ·аҰҫ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҮаҘӨ

аҰҡа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁа§ҮаҰІ аҰЎаҰҝаҰёаҰ•а§ҚаҰІа§ҮаҰҮаҰ®аҰҫаҰ° вҖ“ аҰ•аҰ®аҰҝаҰ•аҰӯаҰҫаҰ°а§ҚаҰё аҰ№аҰІа§Ӣ аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҝ аҰӘаҰӘ аҰ•аҰҫаҰІаҰҡаҰҫаҰ° аҰ•аҰ®а§ҮаҰЁа§ҚаҰҹаҰҫаҰ°аҰҝ аҰ“ аҰ«аҰҝаҰІа§ҚаҰ® аҰ°аҰҝаҰӯаҰҝаҰү аҰҡа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁа§ҮаҰІ, аҰҜаҰҫ аҰ«а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁ аҰҘаҰҝаҰ“аҰ°аҰҝ, аҰ«аҰҝаҰІа§ҚаҰ®, аҰ“аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰ¬ аҰёаҰҝаҰ°аҰҝаҰң аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰҹа§ҚаҰ°а§ҮаҰІаҰҫаҰ° аҰ°аҰҝаҰӯаҰҝаҰүаҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰ° аҰңаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜ аҰүа§ҺаҰёаҰ°а§ҚаҰ—а§ҖаҰ•а§ғаҰӨаҘӨ аҰ•аҰ®аҰҝаҰ•аҰӯаҰҫаҰ°а§ҚаҰё аҰҡа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁа§ҮаҰІ аҰ®аҰҫаҰқа§Ү аҰ®аҰҫаҰқа§Ү аҰ«аҰҝаҰІа§ҚаҰ®, аҰ“аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰ¬ аҰёаҰҝаҰ°аҰҝаҰң, аҰҹа§ҚаҰ°а§ҮаҰІаҰҫаҰ° аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰ—аҰҫаҰЁ аҰёаҰ®а§ҚаҰӘаҰ°а§ҚаҰ•а§Ү аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰ–а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҫаҰ° аҰңаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜ аҰ«аҰҝаҰІа§ҚаҰ® аҰ•а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰӘ, аҰҹаҰҝаҰӯаҰҝ аҰёаҰҝаҰ°аҰҝаҰң аҰ•а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰӘ, аҰ“аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰ¬ аҰёаҰҝаҰ°аҰҝаҰң аҰ•а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰӘ, аҰ…а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁаҰҝаҰ®а§ҮаҰ¶аҰЁ аҰёаҰҝаҰ°аҰҝаҰң аҰ•а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰӘ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ° аҰ•аҰ°а§Ү аҰҘаҰҫаҰ•а§Ү, аҰ•аҰҝаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨа§Ғ аҰ•аҰӘаҰҝаҰ°аҰҫаҰҮаҰҹ аҰҶаҰҮаҰЁ а§§а§Ҝа§ӯа§¬-аҰҸаҰ° а§§а§Ұа§ӯ аҰ§аҰҫаҰ°аҰҫ аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜаҰја§Җ аҰёаҰ®аҰҫаҰІа§ӢаҰҡаҰЁаҰҫ, аҰ®аҰЁа§ҚаҰӨаҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜ, аҰёаҰӮаҰ¬аҰҫаҰҰ аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰӨаҰҝаҰ¬а§ҮаҰҰаҰЁ, аҰ¶аҰҝаҰ•а§ҚаҰ·аҰҫаҰҰаҰҫаҰЁ, аҰ¬а§ғаҰӨа§ҚаҰӨаҰҝ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰ—аҰ¬а§ҮаҰ·аҰЈаҰҫаҰ° аҰ®аҰӨа§Ӣ аҰүаҰҰа§ҚаҰҰа§ҮаҰ¶а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү аҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜа§ҚаҰҜ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҰ° (аҰ«а§ҮаҰҜаҰјаҰҫаҰ° аҰҮаҰүаҰң) аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰ®аҰӨаҰҝ аҰҰа§ҮаҰ“аҰҜаҰјаҰҫ аҰ№аҰҜаҰјаҘӨ

snippet.title: Jiwana Maya
snippet.description:
The song вҖңаӨңаҘҖаӨөаӨЁаӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫвҖқ reflects on the fragile, uncertain, and deeply emotional nature of life and
love.
At its core, it speaks about how life is temporary and unpredictableвҖ”filled with moments of
happiness and sorrow that coexist. The lyrics encourage living joyfully in the present (вҖңlaugh and
let this moment pass in happinessвҖқ), while acknowledging that nothing is permanent: if we meet
again, it will be a reunion; if not, memories will remain.
The song also touches on fate and helplessness, suggesting that certain things in life are already
written and cannot be changed, no matter how much we try. It warns against over-idealizing love
or blindly trusting everything (вҖңdonвҖҷt treat thorns like flowersвҖқ), emphasizing that love exists
alongside pain, loss, and emotional risk.
Overall, вҖңаӨңаҘҖаӨөаӨЁаӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫвҖқ is a reflective and philosophical piece about:
-the impermanence of life
-the bittersweet nature of love
-acceptance of destiny
-and the importance of cherishing present moments without fear of tomorrow
It leaves the listener with a gentle but emotional reminder: live, love, and accept that separation
and memory are both part of human experience.

happiness and sorrow that coexist. The lyrics encourage living joyfully in the present (вҖңlaugh and
let this moment pass in happinessвҖқ), while acknowledging that nothing is permanent: if we meet
again, it will be a reunion; if not, memories will remain.
The song also touches on fate and helplessness, suggesting that certain things in life are already
written and cannot be changed, no matter how much we try. It warns against over-idealizing love
or blindly trusting everything (вҖңdonвҖҷt treat thorns like flowersвҖқ), emphasizing that love exists
alongside pain, loss, and emotional risk.
Overall, вҖңаӨңаҘҖаӨөаӨЁаӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫвҖқ is a reflective and philosophical piece about:
-the impermanence of life
-the bittersweet nature of love
-acceptance of destiny
-and the importance of cherishing present moments without fear of tomorrow
It leaves the listener with a gentle but emotional reminder: live, love, and accept that separation
and memory are both part of human experience.

snippet.title: Tere Paas Main|Main Vaapas Aaunga|@diljitdosanjh,@ARRahman,Imtiaz Ali,Irshad,Vedang,Sharvari,Deepali
snippet.description:
The unspoken promise of love. вқӨпёҸ

Experience the heartfelt melody "Tere Paas Main" from the film Main Vaapas Aaunga. A soulful song that beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and the silent bond that keeps two hearts connected.

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Song Composed, Produced, Arranged by A.R. Rahman
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil
Singer - Deepali Sahay
Mixed and Mastered by Nitish R Kumar
Music Supervisor & Editor - Hiral Viradia

Musicians:
Sarod - Rohan Prasanna
Tabla - Sai Shravanam
Flute - Naveen Kumar
Strings - Philharmonic Orchestra, Prague
Guitar - Shrey Gupta
Additional programming - Shubham Bhat, Marisakthi

Sound Engineers:
Panchathan Record Inn, Chennai
Senior engineers: Suresh Permal, Karthik Sekaran
Assisting engineers: Sathish V Saravanan, Bharath, Sarath Santhosh

Panchathan Record Inn, Mumbai
Senior engineer: Nitish R Kumar
Assisting engineer: Naval Chikhliya

Head of Technical Services: Riyasdeen Riyan
Dolby Atmos Music: Riyasdeen Riyan
Musician Coordinators: R Samidurai, Abdul Hayum

A Film by Imtiaz Ali

Starring: Diljit Dosanjh, Naseeruddin Shah, Vedang Raina, Sharvari
Music by: A. R. Rahman
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil

Written by Imtiaz Ali, Nayanika Mahtani
Director Of Photography: Sylvester Fonseca, ISC
Production Designer: Suman Roy Mahapatra
Editor: Aarti Bajaj
Sound Designer & Production Sound Mixer: Dhiman Karmakar
Costume Designer: Sheetal Iqbal Sharma
Look Designer: Soamaa Goswami
Re-recording Mixer: Alok De
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Associate Director: Suraj Paraswani
First Assistant Director: Adrian Fernandes
Post Producer: Chinmay Ogale
Publicity Design: (H-One) Rahul Nanda, Himanshu Nanda
Visual Effects: Phantom FX
Color: Redchillies.color
Visual Promotions: MA+TH
Digital Promotions: The Small Big Idea
Public Relations: Universal Communications
CMO & Head of Syndication: Sameer Chopra
WSF Marketing: Nidhi Sethia, Dhruv Sinha, Gautam Ahuja, Anushka Arora, Virikkaa
Singhvi, Nibha Purawat
Applause Marketing: Devnidhi Bajoria, Apurva Patade, Leena Baidya, Tanvi Dedhia
Supervising Producer (Applause): Sneha Vashist
Co Producers: Sunil Chainani, Prasoon Garg
Executive Producers: Vishal Bajaj, Pratik Nandkumar More

Produced by Birla Studios & Applause Entertainment
Produced by Window Seat Films, Mohit Choudhary, Shibhasish Sarkar
Music on Tips Music Limited

Lyrics : 
Jaise Tu Hai Paas Mere
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Shaamon Ke Sawere
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Kaagaz Pe Koi Nazam Likhi Hai
Saanson Mein Likkhi/Rehti Nazam 
Jaise Paani Paas Pyaase
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Dil Ke Hain Dilaase
Tere Paas Main 
 
Jhooth Hain Ye Dooriyan
Jhooth Faasla Hai
Tujhe Roz Mil Raha Hun Main
Baat Ho Khayal Mein  
Jaise Honthon Mein Ho Laali
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Kaanon Mein Ho Baali
Tere Paas Main
 
Jaise Tu Hai Paas Mere
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Shaamon Ke Sawere
Tere Paas Main
 
Apni Kahani Utni Rahegi
Chaahe Badha Lo Chaahe Ghata Lo
Kajal Nahin Main Gaalon Ka Til Hun
Mit Ta Nahin Main Kitna Mita Lo
Mera To Hatna Mushqil Bada Hai 
Tum Saamne Se Sheesha Hata Lo 
Jaise Aankhon Ke Ishaare 
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Nadiya Ke Kinaare 
Tere Paas Main 
 
Jaise Neeci Nazar Mein Sharam Chhupi Hai
Saanson Mein Rehti Nazam
Jaise Tu Hai Paas Mere
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Shaamon Ke Sawere
Tere Paas Main

Tu Bansi Bajawa Karishna Jas Ham Banke Nachab Radha

snippet.title: Aarzu (with Asim Azhar) Official Music Video | Asim Azhar, Noor, Khan, Madhurxo
snippet.description:
If Aarzu found a place in your heart, Asim Azhar's rendition takes it even deeper. Wrapped in dreamy melodies and timeless emotion, this version captures the beauty of yearning for someone who never truly leaves.


Listen Now:
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/1GnZH0wek1fkGCQnUsK6D0?si=c8a640db631c4690 Apple Music -  https://music.apple.com/in/song/aarzu-with-asim-azhar/6772998267 
YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=M5OCLifZK1w&si=F6FdB9DEXBskKoUu 

Audio Credits: 
Music by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Lyrics by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Vocals by Asim Azhar, Khan, Madhurxo
Written by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Produced by Noor
Guitars by Melvin Arthur
Mixed & Mastered by Kumail Abbas

Video Credits: 
Director - Khizar Sheikh
Producer - Syed Jahanzaib Ali
Executive Producer - Gul-E-Rana
D.O.P & Edit - Fraz KB 
Grade - Maaz Ahmad Ansari

Lyrics:

(Khan)

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

(Madhurxo)

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

(Asim Azhar)

Oh kaisi dilkashi 
Tujh se dillagi
Mere humnasheenвҖҰ hmmmm
Kioun chupaoun main
Ab koi darr nahi
Tu jaisay meri pari
Masoomiyut chulkay teri
Baatoun se kitniвҖҰhayee
Saada si jo adaaвҖҷein teri
Qatil hai woh
Dil ki meri

Peechay dekhoun raahein teri
Yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

(Unknown)

Phirse Bolo

(Asim Azhar)

Peechay dekho raahein teri
Yaad jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basiвҖҰ tu hi basi

(Khan and Asim)

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basiвҖҰ tu hi basi

(Outro)

Dono jahan teri muhabbat mein haar ke
Woh ja raha hai koi ShabвҖҷe Ghum guzaar ke
WeeraвҖҷan hai maikada khum-o-saagar udaas hain     
Tum kya gaye k rooth gaye din bahaar

Connect: 
Asim Azhar ( https://www.instagram.com/asimazhar/?hl=en)
Khan (https://www.instagram.com/soundslikekhan/)
Noor (https://www.instagram.com/noor_wav/)
Madhurxo (https://www.instagram.com/madhuraaara/)

#AsimAzhar #Aarzu #PakistaniPop #DesiMusic #NewMusic #IPop 

(C) 2026 Asim Azhar

snippet.title: Nachau Jhumera - Yogesh Lama | Lamu Sherpa | Ft. Bhimphedi Guys | Sanjana Gurung | Sagar | Rushlal
snippet.description:
рҹҺө "Nachau Jhumera" is an energetic dance song performed by Yogesh Lama and Lamu Sherpa. Written, composed, and arranged by Yogesh Lama, the song features catchy melodies and an engaging musical arrangement. Directed by Nirmal Kumar Lama, with choreography by Bhimphedi Guys and Sagar Lopchan, the video brings together the performances of Sanjana Gurung, Bhimphedi Guys, Sagar Lopchan, Rushal Syangbo and Rupchen Tamang, creating an entertaining visual and musical experience.

bn.title: ROBLOX-аҰҸ аҰЁа§ӢаҰ¬аҰҰа§ҮаҰ° аҰҹа§ҚаҰ°а§ӢаҰІ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҫаҰ° аҰңаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜ аҰ¬аҰЎаҰҝаҰ¬аҰҝаҰІа§ҚаҰЎаҰҫаҰ° аҰ№а§ҹа§Ү аҰүаҰ аҰІаҰҫаҰ®!!
bn.description:
аҰ°а§ӢаҰ¬аҰІаҰ•а§ҚаҰёа§Ү аҰЁа§ҒаҰ¬аҰҰа§ҮаҰ° аҰҹа§ҚаҰ°аҰІ аҰ•аҰ°аҰӨа§Ү аҰ¬аҰЎаҰҝ аҰ¬аҰҝаҰІа§ҚаҰЎаҰҫаҰ° аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§Ү аҰҜаҰҫаҰЁ!!

а§§а§Ҝа§ӯа§¬ аҰёаҰҫаҰІа§ҮаҰ° аҰ•аҰӘаҰҝаҰ°аҰҫаҰҮаҰҹ аҰҶаҰҮаҰЁа§ҮаҰ° а§§а§Ұа§ӯ аҰ§аҰҫаҰ°аҰҫ аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜаҰја§Җ, аҰёаҰ®аҰҫаҰІа§ӢаҰҡаҰЁаҰҫ, аҰ®аҰЁа§ҚаҰӨаҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜ, аҰёаҰӮаҰ¬аҰҫаҰҰ аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰӨаҰҝаҰ¬а§ҮаҰҰаҰЁ, аҰ¶аҰҝаҰ•а§ҚаҰ·аҰҫаҰҰаҰҫаҰЁ, аҰ¬а§ғаҰӨа§ҚаҰӨаҰҝ, аҰ¶аҰҝаҰ•а§ҚаҰ·аҰҫ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰ—аҰ¬а§ҮаҰ·аҰЈаҰҫаҰ° аҰ®аҰӨа§Ӣ аҰүаҰҰа§ҚаҰҰа§ҮаҰ¶а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү вҖңаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜа§ҚаҰҜ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ°вҖқ-аҰҸаҰ° аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰ®аҰӨаҰҝ аҰҰа§ҮаҰ“аҰҜаҰјаҰҫ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣа§ҮаҘӨ

аҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜа§ҚаҰҜ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ° аҰ№аҰІа§Ӣ аҰ•аҰӘаҰҝаҰ°аҰҫаҰҮаҰҹ аҰҶаҰҮаҰЁ аҰҰа§ҚаҰ¬аҰҫаҰ°аҰҫ аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰ®а§ӢаҰҰаҰҝаҰӨ аҰҸаҰ®аҰЁ аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ° аҰҜаҰҫ аҰ…аҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҘаҰҫаҰҜаҰј аҰІаҰҷа§ҚаҰҳаҰЁаҰ•аҰҫаҰ°а§Җ аҰ№аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҘӨ

snippet.title: Mashooqa (Full HD Video) Kriti Sanon, Shahid Kapoor, Rashmika Mandanna | Cocktail 2 Songs | Pritam
snippet.description:
Presenting the sizzling track "Mashooqa" from the highly anticipated romantic drama 'Cocktail 2'! Get ready to groove to this ultimate modern vibe composed by the hit machine Pritam and Mahmood, bringing a fresh wave of energy to your playlist. 

Hit 'LIKE' if you are playing this on loop, and don't forget to SUBSCRIBE for more exclusive tracks!


Track Credits:
рҹҺӨ Singers: Pritam, Mahmood, Amitabh Bhattacharya, Raghav Chaitanya, Ruaa Kayy
рҹҺө Music Composer: Mahmood, Pritam
вңҚпёҸ Lyricist: Mahmood, Amitabh Bhattacharya
рҹҺ¬ Music Label: Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd. / Maddock Films Pvt. Ltd.

Movie Credits:
рҹҺ¬ Movie: Cocktail 2
вӯҗ Starring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna, Dimple Kapadia, Rohit Saraf, Ishita Dutta
рҹҺ¬ Director: Homi Adajania
рҹ’ј Producer: Dinesh Vijan (Maddock Films)
вңҚпёҸ Writer: Luv Ranjan, Tarun Jain
рҹ“… Theatrical Release Date: June 19, 2026

Lyrics:

Sai mi chiedo perchГ© mi seduci quando ti avvicini 
Parli con la gente non capisco mai
PerchГ© Lo fai 
Sembriamo amici Che finiranno nei guai 

(Come Get Me Now)x4

(Karein toh karein kya dil hai ..
Come get me Now 
Dil hai tabhi mushkil hai
Come get me Now ..) Г—2

CROSS
Pade agar tere liye
Mar bhi jaana

Uff nahin kare deewana

Ma Ma Maashooqa
O My Mashooqa

Teer teri nazron ka
Toh kabhi na chooka

Ma ..
Ma ma ma Maashooqa

O my Maashoqa
Teer teri nazron ka

Na kabhi chooka
Haye haye haye ..

ANTARA

Teer-e-nazar ka banaya tu ne
Jise bhi nishaana
Jaane kyon chaah ke bhi
Chaahe na vo аӨ–аӨјаҘҒаӨҰ ko bachana

Jise gale se ik PAL ke liye BHI tu laga le
Poori umar uss PAL mein
аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӨаӨҫ le vo deewaana

Kaam deevanon ka
Hosh gavana hai
Aur haseenon pe
Dosh lagana hai 

Ma ..
Ma ma ma Maashooqa

O my Maashoqa
Teer teri nazron ka

Na kabhi chooka

Baby cosa cвҖҷГЁ 
Parlami di te 

Resta fuori con me nel week end 

Baby non lo so
Forse partirГІ 
Dammi un segno 
PerchГ© in fondo 
Tu qua vicino dimmi cosa ci fai 
Mi chiedi baby quanti  posti vedrai 

Andiamo nei 
BRUNEI 
Uk
LA
SE SAI 
DI FAKE 
ti saluterГІ

аҰӨаҰҫаҰЎаҰјаҰҫаҰӨаҰҫаҰЎаҰјаҰҝ аҰ«аҰІа§Ӣ аҰ•аҰ°а§Ү аҰЁаҰҝаҰЁ :)

snippet.title: Aakhri Mulakat вҖ“ Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Aakhri Mulakat вҖ“ Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Aakhri mulakat thi shayad...
isliye hum kuch keh na sake.

Tum saamne the...
magar dil ki baatein
dil me hi reh gayin.

Na jaane kyun us din
waqt itni jaldi guzar gaya...
aur hum bas tumhe dekhte hi reh gaye.

вҖңAakhri MulakatвҖқ
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo apni mohabbat se
aakhri baar mila...
aur phir kabhi mil na saka.

Kuch mulaqatein
sirf yaad ban kar reh jaati hain...
aur kuch log
zindagi bhar dil me bas jaate hain.

Is gaane mein
mohabbat bhi hai,
judai bhi hai,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai вҖ”

shayad wahi hamari...
aakhri mulakat thi...

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi se
aakhri baar milkar use hamesha ke liye kho diya ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

LYRICS рҹ“қ

[Intro / аӨҶаӨІаӨҫаӨӘ]
аӨҶ аӨҶ аӨҶ...
аӨ°аҘӮаӨ№ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ°аҘӮаӨ№ аӨёаҘҮ аӨңаҘӢаӨЎаӨј аӨҰаҘӮаӨҒ,
аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨөаӨҫаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҮ аӨӣаҘӢаӨЎаӨј аӨҰаҘӮаӨҒ...

[аӨ®аҘҒаӨ–аӨЎаӨјаӨҫ / Chorus]
аӨЁаӨңаӨјаӨ° аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ¬аӨёаҘҖ аӨ®аӨӮаӨңаӨјаӨҝаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ,
аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨӨаӨҫ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨӨаҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ–аӨјаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аӨ° аӨҡаҘҒаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ№аҘӮаӨҒ,
аӨҜаҘҮ аӨөаҘӢ аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨңаҘӢ аӨ•аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ°аҘҒаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁ аӨІаҘҮ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨҶаӨ–аӨјаӨҝаӨ°аҘҖ аӨёаӨҰаӨҫ,
аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨҮаӨ¬аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨҮаӨ®аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨ№аӨҫаӨЁаҘӨ

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҮаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ•аӨј аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨҠаӨҒ аӨ«аӨјаӨЁаӨҫ,
аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨ–аӨјаҘҒаӨҰ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ№аӨҫ аӨ•аӨ° аӨңаӨҫаҘӨ
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҮаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ•аӨј аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨҠаӨҒ аӨ«аӨјаӨЁаӨҫ,
аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҰаҘҖаӨЁ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨӨаҘӮ, аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ–аӨјаҘҒаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ•аӨ° аӨңаӨҫаҘӨ

[аӨ…аӨӮаӨӨаӨ°аӨҫ 1]
аӨӨаӨёаӨөаҘҚаӨөаҘҒаӨ° аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ°аӨҫаӨӨаҘҮаӨӮ аӨўаӨІаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ,
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ–аҘҒаӨ¶аӨ¬аҘӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨёаҘҮаӨӮ аӨҡаӨІаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ
аӨ®аҘӢаӨ№аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ¬аӨӨ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҲаӨёаӨҫ аӨ…аӨёаӨ° аӨ№аҘҲ,
аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аҘӮаӨҒ, аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаҘӮ аӨ–аӨҝаӨІаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ°аҘҒаӨ–аӨјаӨёаӨҫаӨ° аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨЁаҘӮаӨ°-аӨҸ-аӨёаӨ№аӨ° аӨ№аҘҲ,
аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨЁаӨ—аҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨё аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ«аӨјаӨҝаӨ•аҘҚаӨ° аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨ•аӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ®аӨ° аӨЁ аӨңаӨҫаӨҠаӨҒ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨҮаӨё аӨӨаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨЁаӨ—аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ,
аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨңаӨјаӨҝаӨ•аҘҚаӨ° аӨ•аӨ° аӨҰаҘҮ аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ–аӨјаҘҒаӨҰаҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ

аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁ аӨІаҘҮ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨҶаӨ–аӨјаӨҝаӨ°аҘҖ аӨёаӨҰаӨҫ,
аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨҮаӨ¬аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨҮаӨ®аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨ№аӨҫаӨЁаҘӨ

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҮаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ•аӨј аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨҠаӨҒ аӨ«аӨјаӨЁаӨҫ,
аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨ–аӨјаҘҒаӨҰ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ№аӨҫ аӨ•аӨ° аӨңаӨҫаҘӨ

[аӨ…аӨӮаӨӨаӨ°аӨҫ 2]
аӨӘаӨҫаӨ•аҘҖаӨңаӨјаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝаӨӨаӨЁаҘҖ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨӨ,
аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаҘҖ аӨӯаӨҹаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ°аӨҫаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨ№аӨҝаӨҰаӨҫаӨҜаӨӨаҘӨ
аӨёаӨңаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ¬аӨӮаӨҰаӨ—аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ,
аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ№аӨ° аӨҸаӨ• аӨІаӨ®аҘҚаӨ№аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аӨҝаӨ«аӨҫаӨңаӨјаӨӨаҘӨ

аӨ®аӨҝаӨҹ аӨңаӨҫаӨҸ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨ№аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҖ аӨңаҘӢ аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ®аҘҒаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨҸ,
аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ№аӨ° аӨҸаӨ• аӨ•аӨјаӨӨаӨ°аӨҫ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨ—аӨҫаӨҸаҘӨ
аӨӨаҘӮ аӨЁаӨёаҘҖаӨ¬ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ, аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨёаӨ№аӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ,
аӨўаҘӮаӨӮаӨў аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ°аҘӮаӨ№ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҒаӨқаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝаӨЁаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫаҘӨ


[аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨң / аӨ№аӨҫаӨҲ аӨӘаӨҝаӨҡ]
аӨ…аӨ•аҘҚаӨё аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҶаӨҲаӨЁаҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аӨӯаҘҖ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аӨҹаҘҮ,
аӨңаӨјаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ—аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨ°аӨҫаӨӨаҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҹаҘҮаҘӨ
аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ¶аӨ®аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨӘаӨ°аӨөаӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨЁаҘӮаӨҒ,
аӨҰаҘҒаӨҶ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨё аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨҜаӨ№аҘҖ аӨ№аӨ° аӨӘаӨІ аӨ•аӨ№аҘӮаӨҒ...


[аӨҶаӨүаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ]
аӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ... аӨ«аӨјаӨЁаӨҫ... аӨ№аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨҠаӨҒ аӨ«аӨјаӨЁаӨҫ...
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҮаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ•аӨј аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ... аӨ«аӨјаӨЁаӨҫ...

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ–аҘҒаӨ¶аӨ¬аҘӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨёаҘҮаӨӮ аӨҡаӨІаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ
аӨ®аҘӢаӨ№аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ¬аӨӨ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҲаӨёаӨҫ аӨ…аӨёаӨ° аӨ№аҘҲ,
аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аҘӮаӨҒ, аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаҘӮ аӨ–аӨҝаӨІаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ°аҘҒаӨ–аӨјаӨёаӨҫаӨ° аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨЁаҘӮаӨ°-аӨҸ-аӨёаӨ№аӨ° аӨ№аҘҲ,
аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨЁаӨ—аҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨё аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ«аӨјаӨҝаӨ•аҘҚаӨ° аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨ•аӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ®аӨ° аӨЁ аӨңаӨҫаӨҠаӨҒ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨҮаӨё аӨӨаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨЁаӨ—аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ,
аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨңаӨјаӨҝаӨ•аҘҚаӨ° аӨ•аӨ° аӨҰаҘҮ аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ–аӨјаҘҒаӨҰаҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ

аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁ аӨІаҘҮ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨҶаӨ–аӨјаӨҝаӨ°аҘҖ аӨёаӨҰаӨҫ,
аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨҮаӨ¬аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨҮаӨ®аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨ№аӨҫаӨЁаҘӨ

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҮаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ•аӨј аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨҠаӨҒ аӨ«аӨјаӨЁаӨҫ,
аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨ–аӨјаҘҒаӨҰ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ№аӨҫ аӨ•аӨ° аӨңаӨҫаҘӨ

[аӨ…аӨӮаӨӨаӨ°аӨҫ 2]
аӨӘаӨҫаӨ•аҘҖаӨңаӨјаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝаӨӨаӨЁаҘҖ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨӨ,
аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаҘҖ аӨӯаӨҹаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ°аӨҫаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨ№аӨҝаӨҰаӨҫаӨҜаӨӨаҘӨ
аӨёаӨңаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ¬аӨӮаӨҰаӨ—аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ,
аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ№аӨ° аӨҸаӨ• аӨІаӨ®аҘҚаӨ№аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аӨҝаӨ«аӨҫаӨңаӨјаӨӨаҘӨ

аӨ®аӨҝаӨҹ аӨңаӨҫаӨҸ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨ№аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҖ аӨңаҘӢ аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ®аҘҒаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨҸ,
аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ№аӨ° аӨҸаӨ• аӨ•аӨјаӨӨаӨ°аӨҫ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨ—аӨҫаӨҸаҘӨ
аӨӨаҘӮ аӨЁаӨёаҘҖаӨ¬ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ, аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨёаӨ№аӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ,
аӨўаҘӮаӨӮаӨў аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ°аҘӮаӨ№ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҒаӨқаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝаӨЁаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫаҘӨ


[аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨң / аӨ№аӨҫаӨҲ аӨӘаӨҝаӨҡ]
аӨ…аӨ•аҘҚаӨё аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҶаӨҲаӨЁаҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аӨӯаҘҖ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аӨҹаҘҮ,
аӨңаӨјаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ—аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨ°аӨҫаӨӨаҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҹаҘҮаҘӨ
аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ¶аӨ®аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨӘаӨ°аӨөаӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨЁаҘӮаӨҒ,
аӨҰаҘҒаӨҶ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨё аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨҜаӨ№аҘҖ аӨ№аӨ° аӨӘаӨІ аӨ•аӨ№аҘӮаӨҒ...


[аӨҶаӨүаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ]
аӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ... аӨ«аӨјаӨЁаӨҫ... аӨ№аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨҠаӨҒ аӨ«аӨјаӨЁаӨҫ...
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҮаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ•аӨј аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ... аӨ«аӨјаӨЁаӨҫ...

аӨҠ аӨҠ аӨҠ аӨҠ аӨҠ  
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ—аӨҫаӨ№аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ  
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ№аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ  
аӨ•аӨ°аҘҖаӨ¬ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ—аӨҜаҘҖ аӨңаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ—аҘҖ

аӨӨаҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨҒ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫ  
аӨ¶аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫаӨҜаӨӨаҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аӨ°аҘӮ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖ  
аӨҘаӨ®аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨёаҘҮаӨӮ  
аӨӘаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨҶаӨҒаӨ–аҘҮаӨӮ  
аӨёаӨ№аҘӮ аӨ•аҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ«аӨҫаӨёаӨІаӨҫ

bn.title: ROBLOX-аҰҸ аҰ…а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁаҰҝаҰ®а§ҮаҰІ аҰ№аҰёаҰӘаҰҝаҰҹаҰҫаҰІ аҰ…а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁа§ӢаҰ®а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰІаҰҝаҰёа§ҮаҰ° аҰ¬аҰҝаҰӘаҰҰ аҰҘа§ҮаҰ•а§Ү аҰ¬а§ҮаҰҒаҰҡа§Ү аҰҘаҰҫаҰ•аҰҫ!!
bn.description:
аҰ°а§ӢаҰ¬аҰІаҰ•а§ҚаҰёа§Ү аҰӘаҰ¶а§Ғ аҰ№аҰҫаҰёаҰӘаҰҫаҰӨаҰҫаҰІа§ҮаҰ° аҰ…аҰҰа§ҚаҰӯа§ҒаҰӨ аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰЈа§ҖаҰҰа§ҮаҰ° аҰҘа§ҮаҰ•а§Ү аҰ¬а§ҮаҰҒаҰҡа§Ү аҰ«а§ҮаҰ°аҰҫ!!

аҰ¬аҰЁа§ҚаҰ§а§ҒаҰ°аҰҫ, аҰҶаҰ®аҰҫаҰ•а§Ү аҰҸаҰ–аҰҫаҰЁа§Ү аҰҮаҰЁа§ҚаҰёаҰҹаҰҫаҰ—а§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰ®а§Ү аҰ«аҰІа§Ӣ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ - https://www.instagram.com/shivang_ranjan41/

а§§а§Ҝа§ӯа§¬ аҰёаҰҫаҰІа§ҮаҰ° аҰ•аҰӘаҰҝаҰ°аҰҫаҰҮаҰҹ аҰҶаҰҮаҰЁа§ҮаҰ° а§§а§Ұа§ӯ аҰ§аҰҫаҰ°аҰҫ аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜаҰја§Җ аҰ•аҰӘаҰҝаҰ°аҰҫаҰҮаҰҹ аҰҰаҰҫаҰ¬аҰҝаҰӨа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰ—, аҰёаҰ®аҰҫаҰІа§ӢаҰҡаҰЁаҰҫ, аҰ®аҰЁа§ҚаҰӨаҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜ, аҰёаҰӮаҰ¬аҰҫаҰҰ аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰӨаҰҝаҰ¬а§ҮаҰҰаҰЁ, аҰ¶аҰҝаҰ•а§ҚаҰ·аҰҫаҰҰаҰҫаҰЁ, аҰ¬а§ғаҰӨа§ҚаҰӨаҰҝ, аҰ¶аҰҝаҰ•а§ҚаҰ·аҰҫ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰ—аҰ¬а§ҮаҰ·аҰЈаҰҫаҰ° аҰ®аҰӨа§Ӣ аҰүаҰҰа§ҚаҰҰа§ҮаҰ¶а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү "аҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜа§ҚаҰҜ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҰ°" аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰ®аҰӨаҰҝ аҰҰа§ҮаҰ“аҰҜаҰјаҰҫ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣа§ҮаҘӨ

аҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜа§ҚаҰҜ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ° аҰ№аҰІа§Ӣ аҰ•аҰӘаҰҝаҰ°аҰҫаҰҮаҰҹ аҰҶаҰҮаҰЁ аҰҰа§ҚаҰ¬аҰҫаҰ°аҰҫ аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰ®а§ӢаҰҰаҰҝаҰӨ аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ°, аҰҜаҰҫ аҰ…аҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҘаҰҫаҰҜаҰј аҰІаҰҷа§ҚаҰҳаҰЁаҰ•аҰҫаҰ°а§Җ аҰ№аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҘӨ

аҰҜа§ҮаҰ•а§ӢаҰЁа§Ӣ аҰёаҰ®аҰёа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫ аҰёаҰ®а§ҚаҰӘаҰ°а§ҚаҰ•а§Ү аҰҶаҰ®аҰҫаҰҰа§ҮаҰ° аҰҸаҰ–аҰҫаҰЁа§Ү аҰҮаҰ®а§ҮаҰІ аҰ•аҰ°аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҰЁ - shivangcare@gmail.com

snippet.title: Sannani | Bikash X Beon X Pawan | Dreamstage Production
snippet.description:
SANNANI (Official Music Video Release)  By Dreamstage Productions 
Subscribe to DreamStage Productions to stay updated with our latest music videos, exclusive releases, and exciting upcoming projects. Thank you for your supportвҖ”more amazing content is on the way!
Stay tuned for future releases and be part of our musical journey.
https://www.youtube.com/@UCknIU_nxhciR_kaB7mONdwQ 

Presenting the official music video of "Sannani," one of the most viral Nepali TikTok songs, reaching over 20 million people across social media platforms. This track combines catchy melodies, energetic beats, and an experimental musical style to create a unique listening experience. Originally released as an audio track on May 20, 2026, "Sannani" quickly became a major TikTok sensation. 

Audio Credits:
Vocals: Bikash Chandra Thapa, Beon Beats, Pawan Chand
Studio : Dreamstage Recording Studios
Producer/mix-master: Beon Beats
Featuring: Bikash, Beon, Pawan 
Genre: Nepali Melodic Hip-Hop, Experimental Song
Music Video Official Release 2026
Ownership Protected by : SwarVision Entertainment Pvt. Ltd.  
If you enjoyed the song, don't forget to:
Like, Comment, Subscribe & Share with your friends.

Production House: LOCOLIZE CREATIVES PVT. LTD.
Directed By: Bijesh Bajracharya & Aone Magar
Director of Photography (DOP): Sachet Kadel & Bijesh Bajracharya

snippet.title: GOD STYLE  | YO YO HONEY SINGH | Hommie Dilliwala | Full Video
snippet.description:
Here's  #GodStyle by Yo Yo Honey Singh.
Song : GOD STYLE 
*SINGER : YO YO HONEY SINGH* 
Lyrics: Hommie dilliwala
Music producer: *YO YO HONEY SINGH*

Aya Vijayta 
Khuda ka chaheta 
Yodha hai subhe wo 
Raat ko dracula 
BeatвҖҷein hai sajata

Karwata bachata 

Kara ni diss abhi Fir bhi ye baithe hai sehem ke 
Duniya kehti yoyo thoda Toh rehem de 

Ikyavan gaane daale 
Jal ke kaale saale 
Chaabi faiki maine 
Muh pe maare taale 

Inke ney gaane lagte 
Jaise puraane 
Music sudharne 
bheja hai khuda ne

RAP GOD Macha di tabaahi 
Im handpicked by uparwala hi 

yaar mila de

Rakhlunga bottal me

bn.title: аҰҶаҰ®аҰҝ а§§а§Ұ аҰҹаҰҫаҰ•аҰҫ аҰҘа§ҮаҰ•а§Ү а§§а§Ұ,а§Ұа§Ұа§Ұ аҰҹаҰҫаҰ•аҰҫаҰ° аҰңа§ӢаҰЁ аҰӘа§ҒаҰ¶аҰҫаҰ° аҰӯаҰҫа§ңаҰҫ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҮаҰӣаҰҝ рҹҳұ аҰ—а§ҚаҰ°а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰЎаҰ®аҰҫаҰёа§ҚаҰҹаҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҰ° аҰңаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜ аҰёа§ҮаҰ°аҰҫ аҰ•а§ӢаҰЁаҰҹаҰҝ? вҖ“ Garena...

аҰҸаҰҮ аҰӯаҰҝаҰЎаҰҝаҰ“аҰӨа§Ү, аҰҶаҰ®аҰҝ а§§а§Ұ аҰҹаҰҫаҰ•аҰҫ, а§«а§Ұа§Ұ аҰҹаҰҫаҰ•аҰҫ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ а§§а§Ұ,а§Ұа§Ұа§Ұ аҰҹаҰҫаҰ•аҰҫаҰ° аҰңа§ӢаҰЁ аҰӘа§ҒаҰ¶аҰҫаҰ° аҰЁаҰҝаҰҜаҰја§ӢаҰ— аҰ•аҰ°а§ҮаҰӣаҰҝ аҰҸаҰҹаҰҫ аҰ–а§ҒаҰҒаҰңа§Ү аҰ¬а§ҮаҰ° аҰ•аҰ°аҰҫаҰ° аҰңаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜ аҰҜа§Ү аҰ—аҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҰЁаҰҫ аҰ«а§ҚаҰ°аҰҝ аҰ«аҰҫаҰҜаҰјаҰҫаҰ°а§Ү аҰ•а§ӢаҰЁаҰҹаҰҝаҰӨа§Ү аҰҹаҰҫаҰ•аҰҫ аҰ–аҰ°аҰҡ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҫ аҰҶаҰёаҰІа§ҮаҰҮ аҰІаҰҫаҰӯаҰңаҰЁаҰ•! рҹҳұ аҰ•аҰ® аҰҰаҰҫаҰ®а§ҮаҰ° аҰңа§ӢаҰЁ аҰӘа§ҒаҰ¶аҰҫаҰ° аҰ•аҰҝ аҰ—а§ҚаҰ°а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰЎаҰ®аҰҫаҰёа§ҚаҰҹаҰҫаҰ° аҰ№аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°а§Ү, аҰЁаҰҫаҰ•аҰҝ аҰҰаҰҫаҰ®а§Җ аҰңаҰЁаҰҮ аҰҶаҰёаҰІа§Ү аҰёа§ҮаҰ°аҰҫ? аҰёаҰ®а§ҚаҰӘа§ӮаҰ°а§ҚаҰЈ аҰӨа§ҒаҰІаҰЁаҰҫ, аҰ—а§ҮаҰ®аҰӘа§ҚаҰІа§Ү, аҰ«аҰІаҰҫаҰ«аҰІ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰёаҰ¬аҰҡа§ҮаҰҜаҰја§Ү аҰ¬аҰЎаҰј аҰҡаҰ®аҰ•аҰҹаҰҝ аҰҰа§ҮаҰ–аҰӨа§Ү аҰ¶а§ҮаҰ· аҰӘаҰ°а§ҚаҰҜаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨ аҰҰа§ҮаҰ–а§ҒаҰЁаҘӨ

Album :-Karpur Gauram - Lofi 
Song :-  Karpur Gauram - Lofi 
Singer :- Prakash Soni 


аӨ•аӨ°аҘҚаӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аӨ—аҘҢаӨ°аӨӮ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҒаӨЈаӨҫаӨөаӨӨаӨҫаӨ°аӨӮ аӨёаӨӮаӨёаӨҫаӨ°аӨёаӨҫаӨ°аӨ®аҘҚ аӨӯаҘҒаӨңаӨ—аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаҘҚаӨ°аӨ№аӨҫаӨ°аӨ®аҘҚ аҘӨ
аӨёаӨҰаӨҫаӨөаӨёаӨЁаҘҚаӨӨаӨӮ аӨ№аҘғаӨҰаӨҜаӨҫаӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаҘҮ аӨӯаӨөаӨӮ аӨӯаӨөаӨҫаӨЁаҘҖаӨёаӨ№аӨҝаӨӨаӨӮ аӨЁаӨ®аӨҫаӨ®аӨҝ аҘҘ


аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ¶аӨҝаӨө,
аӨҶаӨӘ аӨ•аӨӘаҘӮаӨ° аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӯаӨҫаӨӮаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ¶аҘҒаӨҰаҘҚаӨ§ аӨёаҘһаҘҮаӨҰ аӨ№аҘҲ,
аӨҶаӨӘ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҒаӨЈаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨөаӨӨаӨҫаӨ°,
аӨӨаҘҒаӨ® аӨ№аҘӢ | аӨёаӨҫаӨӮаӨёаӨҫаӨ°аӨҝаӨ• аӨ…аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨӨаҘҚаӨө аӨ•аӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨ°,
аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ®аӨҫаӨІаӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ—аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨңаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ,
аӨҶаӨӘ аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨ¶аӨҫ аӨ№аҘғаӨҰаӨҜ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨ®аӨІ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨӮаӨҰаӨ° аӨЁаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨё аӨ•аӨ° аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ¶аӨҝаӨө аӨ”аӨ° аӨ¶аӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ•аҘӢ
аӨҸаӨ• аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨЁаӨ®аӨЁ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӮаӨҒ|

Nirjala Ekadashi, аӨӘаӨҫаӨЈаҘҚаӨЎаӨөаӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫаӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ, Nirjala Ekadashi Vrat Katha, Nirjala Ekadashi 2026,аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ, Ekadashi Vrat Katha, Nirjala Ekadashi Ki Katha, Nirjala Ekadashi Vrat, Nirjala Ekadashi Ki Kahani, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ 2026,  аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аӨ№аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ, Ekadashi Vrat, Nirjala Ekadashi Katha, Nirjala Ekadashi Story, Nirjala Ekadashi Vrat 2025, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ 2026, Nirjala Ekadashi Story, Ekadashi, Ekadashi Ki Kahani, Ekadashi Vrat Katha, Ekadashi 2026, , аӨӯаҘҖаӨ®аӨёаҘҮаӨЁаҘҖ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ, Nirjala Ekadashi Vrat Katha,  аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ, аӨӯаҘҖаӨ®аӨёаҘҮаӨЁаҘҖ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ, Pandav Ekadashi, Nirjala Ekadashi Vrat 2026, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ°аӨё аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ, Nirjala Ekadashi Vrat 20265, Ekadashi Ki Katha, Bhimasen Ekadashi, Vrat Katha, Nirjala Ekadashi Katha , Bhimseni Ekadashi, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ, аӨ®аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ,  аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ, Nirjala Ekadashi Ki Katha, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аӨ№аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ, Nirjala Ekadashi, Nirjala Ekadashi Katha, Nirjala Ekadashi Ki Gatha, 2026 Nirjala Ekadashi Vrat, аӨөаӨҝаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаҘҒ аӨңаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨҫаӨ“, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨёаҘҚаӨӘаҘҮаӨ¶аӨІ аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨҫаӨ“, аӨөаӨҝаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаҘҒ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨӘаҘӮаӨңаӨҫ, Nirjala Ekadashi Katha Sunao, аӨөаӨҝаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаҘҒ аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ аӨЁаҘүаӨЁаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘүаӨӘ, Nirjala Ekadashi 2026, Om Jai Ekadashi Mata , Ekadashi Katha & Aarti ,

Nirjala Ekadashi, аӨӘаӨҫаӨЈаҘҚаӨЎаӨөаӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫаӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ, Nirjala Ekadashi Vrat Katha, Nirjala Ekadashi 2026,аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ, Ekadashi Vrat Katha, Nirjala Ekadashi Ki Katha, Nirjala Ekadashi Vrat, Nirjala Ekadashi Ki Kahani, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ 2026,  аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аӨ№аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ, Ekadashi Vrat, Nirjala Ekadashi Katha, Nirjala Ekadashi Story, Nirjala Ekadashi Vrat 2025, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ 2026, Nirjala Ekadashi Story, Ekadashi, Ekadashi Ki Kahani, Ekadashi Vrat Katha, Ekadashi 2026, , аӨӯаҘҖаӨ®аӨёаҘҮаӨЁаҘҖ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ, Nirjala Ekadashi Vrat Katha,  аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ, аӨӯаҘҖаӨ®аӨёаҘҮаӨЁаҘҖ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ, Pandav Ekadashi, Nirjala Ekadashi Vrat 2026, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ°аӨё аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ, Nirjala Ekadashi Vrat 20265, Ekadashi Ki Katha, Bhimasen Ekadashi, Vrat Katha, Nirjala Ekadashi Katha , Bhimseni Ekadashi, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ, аӨ®аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ,  аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ, Nirjala Ekadashi Ki Katha, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аӨ№аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ, Nirjala Ekadashi, Nirjala Ekadashi Katha, Nirjala Ekadashi Ki Gatha, 2026 Nirjala Ekadashi Vrat, аӨөаӨҝаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаҘҒ аӨңаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨҫаӨ“, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨёаҘҚаӨӘаҘҮаӨ¶аӨІ аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ, аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨҫаӨ“, аӨөаӨҝаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаҘҒ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҫаӨҰаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨӘаҘӮаӨңаӨҫ, Nirjala Ekadashi Katha Sunao, аӨөаӨҝаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаҘҒ аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ аӨЁаҘүаӨЁаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘүаӨӘ, Nirjala Ekadashi 2026, Om Jai Ekadashi Mata , Ekadashi Katha & Aarti ,

snippet.title: Oasis Thapa -  Sakey / аӨёаӨ•аҘҮ
snippet.description:
Sake by Oasis Thapa  |  аӨёаӨ•аҘҮ  [ Official Music Video ]

Hi! bhanna ta dherai kura bhanna man cha tara kaa bata po suru garney... A song written 3 years ago with 3 different version each year. Ek point ma ta laageko thyo hyaa ettikai haaldinchu ma kina etro mehenat gariraachu bhanera tara khai man le namaanney. Ajjai pugena, yo bhayena, tyo bhayena, yo ajjai better garna sakchu, I can polish this a lot more bhanney soch le 3 barsa laagyo yo geet release garna. I guess this urge to serve quality everytime is a gift and a curse but so far I'm super satisfied with the end craft. The whole entire team was teaming. Yesai sndarva ma I hope I get to release my songs more consistently which I've written for over 4 years. Some old and some recent. Life been nerfing me so much I'm just discovering esto ni hudo raicha bhanera. I be like f'k yeah new year new energy and motivation to do more and then every year life be like here hold this new L for now. K sikaauna khojeko ni tha chaina. Just weird. There has been a few blessings I've received which I'm super grateful for though. There's this strong sense to protect that unlike anything. So, yeah a little life update but I really hope I can keep serving for now. See you guys on the next one.

Audio Link:
https://open.spotify.com/track/5P5m2swluasZrMNIsRShw4?si=96POEiDcR6yCDnBkxDz10Q

Find all of Oasis:

Anuj Limbu         (Bawarchi baba)
Tilasmi Prajapati
Bipul Kharal         (Bhyape Bhai)
Abiskar Jaathaa

------------------------------------------
Lyrics:

Sakey ta ma dine thiye
Bache kuche ka sara
Mero Maya timi lai
Mero Maya timi lai

Sochina kahilei timrai barey
Timrai aakhaa kai pareli le jhukkyaaula
Todera jodidai
Dhadkera rokidai
Tadpera jogidai
Sambhaalula

Jhutho aashaa jhutho sapanaa
lai parkhera
Adhuro chahaanaa apuraa bahaanaa 
lai samjhera

Baaki rahey 
Nisaasiyeko saasai jaleyra 
Bhymari jhai aago salki rahey
Chaati chhiya chhiya kharaani bhaye

Sake ta ma diney thiye
Bache kuchey ka saaraa
Mero maya timi lai
Mero maya timi lai

Timi lai ma
Timi

Doman bho mutu mero dui bhaagai anidho
Badliyo mausam mero ujeli dhaakiyo
Farkiyo baadal kaalo sang jhari orli
Sakhaapai mero haal chaalai bharam mai
Baache jhai bhaako cha maya
Kun kissa metaaye mandir kun jalaayera
Milcha aanandi yahaa? 

Sakye ta sakey ta
Sake ta ma
Sakeye ta sakey ta
Shakey ta ma

-------------------------------------------------------------

Ajjai pugena, yo bhayena, tyo bhayena, yo ajjai better garna sakchu, I can polish this a lot more bhanney soch le 3 barsa laagyo yo geet release garna. I guess this urge to serve quality everytime is a gift and a curse but so far I'm super satisfied with the end craft. The whole entire team was teaming. Yesai sndarva ma I hope I get to release my songs more consistently which I've written for over 4 years. Some old and some recent. Life been nerfing me so much I'm just discovering esto ni hudo raicha bhanera. I be like f'k yeah new year new energy and motivation to do more and then every year life be like here hold this new L for now. K sikaauna khojeko ni tha chaina. Just weird. There has been a few blessings I've received which I'm super grateful for though. There's this strong sense to protect that unlike anything. So, yeah a little life update but I really hope I can keep serving for now. See you guys on the next one.

бҙ„бҙҸбҙҳКҸКҖЙӘЙўКңбҙӣ бҙ…ЙӘsбҙ„КҹбҙҖЙӘбҙҚбҙҮКҖ бҙңЙҙбҙ…бҙҮКҖ sбҙҮбҙ„бҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ 107 бҙҸТ“ бҙӣКңбҙҮ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҳКҸКҖЙӘЙўКңбҙӣ бҙҖбҙ„бҙӣ 1976 бҙӣКңбҙҮ бҙҖКҹКҹбҙҸбҙЎбҙҖЙҙбҙ„бҙҮ бҙЎбҙҖs бҙҚбҙҖбҙ…бҙҮ Т“бҙҸКҖ ''Т“бҙҖЙӘКҖ бҙңsбҙҮ''  Т“бҙҸКҖ бҙҳбҙңКҖбҙҳбҙҸsбҙҮ sбҙңбҙ„Кң бҙҖs бҙ„КҖЙӘбҙӣЙӘбҙ„ЙӘsбҙҚs бҙ„бҙҸбҙҚбҙҚбҙҮЙҙбҙӣ ЙҙбҙҮбҙЎs КҖбҙҮбҙҳбҙҸКҖбҙӣЙӘЙҙЙў бҙӣбҙҮбҙҖбҙ„КңЙӘЙҙЙў sбҙ„КңбҙҸКҹбҙҖКҖsКңЙӘбҙҳ бҙҖЙҙбҙ… КҖбҙҮsбҙҮбҙҖКҖбҙ„Кң Т“бҙҖЙӘКҖ бҙңsбҙҮ ЙӘs бҙҖ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҳКҸКҖЙӘЙўКңбҙӣ КҹбҙҖбҙЎ бҙӣКңбҙҖбҙӣ бҙЎЙӘКҹКҹ бҙЎЙӘКҹКҹ бҙҸбҙӣКңбҙҮКҖбҙЎЙӘsбҙҮ КҷбҙҮ ЙӘЙҙТ“КҖЙӘЙҙЙўЙӘЙҙЙў ЙҙбҙҸЙҙ-бҙҳКҖбҙҸТ“ЙӘбҙӣ бҙҮбҙ…бҙңбҙ„бҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ бҙҸКҖ бҙҳбҙҮКҖsбҙҸЙҙбҙҖКҹ бҙңsбҙҮ ЙӘТ“ КҸбҙҸбҙң КңбҙҖбҙ бҙҮ бҙҖЙҙКҸ бҙҳКҖбҙҸКҷКҹбҙҮбҙҚ бҙ„бҙҸЙҙбҙӣбҙҖбҙ„бҙӣ бҙңs бҙЎбҙҮ бҙЎЙӘКҹКҹ КҖбҙҮбҙҸбҙҚбҙ бҙҮ бҙҸбҙңКҖ бҙ ЙӘбҙ…бҙҮбҙҸ бҙ…бҙҸЙҙ'бҙӣ ЙўЙӘбҙ бҙҮ КңбҙҖбҙӣбҙҮ бҙӣКңбҙҖЙҙбҙӢs

ЧӣЧң Ч©Ч—Ч§Чҹ ЧһЧ§Ч‘Чң Ч’Чқ ЧӨЧҷЧЎЧӘ Ч§ЧЁЧ§Чў ЧңЧҗ ЧһЧӨЧ•ЧӘЧ—ЧӘ ЧһЧ©ЧңЧ• ЧҷЧ—Ч“ ЧўЧқ ЧҗЧЁЧ’Ч– ЧӣЧңЧҷЧқ Ч•ЧҷЧЁЧҳЧ•ЧҗЧңЧҷ Ч©Ч‘ЧўЧ–ЧЁЧӘЧ• Ч ЧҷЧӘЧҹ ЧңЧўЧҰЧ‘ Ч•ЧңЧ‘Ч Ч•ЧӘ ЧӣЧң Ч“Ч‘ЧЁ - Ч‘ЧҷЧҹ ЧҗЧқ Ч–Ч” Ч’Ч•ЧЁЧ“ Ч©Ч—Ч§ЧҷЧқ Ч ЧҷЧ•Ч•Чҳ, ЧһЧЎЧ•Ч§ ЧӨЧўЧҷЧң, ЧһЧӣЧ•Ч ЧӘ ЧӨЧҷЧ Ч‘Ч•Чң ЧўЧ Ч§ЧҷЧӘ, ЧһЧ©Ч—Ч§ ЧһЧЁЧ•Ч‘Ч” ЧһЧ©ЧӘЧӘЧӨЧҷЧқ "ЧңЧӣЧҷЧ“ЧӘ Ч”Ч“Ч’Чң" ЧҗЧ• ЧҷЧҰЧҷЧЁЧ” ЧҗЧ—ЧЁЧӘ Ч©ЧҳЧЁЧқ Ч”Ч•ЧһЧҰЧҗЧ”. ЧҗЧҷЧҹ ЧўЧңЧ•ЧӘ ЧўЧ‘Ч•ЧЁ Ч—ЧңЧ§ЧӘ ЧҗЧ“ЧһЧ” Ч•ЧҷЧЁЧҳЧ•ЧҗЧңЧҷЧӘ ЧЁЧҗЧ©Ч•Ч Ч” Ч–Ч•. ЧўЧң ЧҷЧ“Чҷ Ч”Ч©ЧӘЧӘЧӨЧ•ЧӘ Ч•Ч‘Ч ЧҷЧҷЧӘ Ч“Ч‘ЧЁЧҷЧқ ЧһЧ’Ч ЧҷЧ‘ЧҷЧқ, Ч—Ч‘ЧЁЧҷ ROBLOX ЧҷЧӣЧ•ЧңЧҷЧқ ЧңЧ”ЧЁЧ•Ч•ЧҷЧ— ЧӘЧ’ЧҷЧқ ЧһЧҷЧ•Ч—Ч“ЧҷЧқ Ч•ЧӣЧҹ Ч“Ч•ЧңЧЁЧҷЧқ Ч©Чң ROBLOX ("Robux"). Ч‘ЧӘЧ•ЧЁЧқ, Ч”Чқ ЧҷЧӣЧ•ЧңЧҷЧқ ЧңЧ§Ч Ч•ЧӘ Ч‘Ч§ЧҳЧңЧ•Ч’ Ч”ЧһЧ§Ч•Ч•Чҹ Ч‘Ч’Ч“ЧҷЧқ Ч•ЧҗЧ‘ЧҷЧ–ЧЁЧҷЧқ ЧңЧҗЧ•Ч•ЧҳЧҗЧЁЧҷЧқ, ЧӣЧһЧ• Ч’Чқ Ч—Ч•ЧһЧЁЧҷ Ч‘Ч ЧҷЧҷЧ” ЧҗЧҷЧӣЧ•ЧӘЧҷЧҷЧқ, ЧЁЧӣЧҷЧ‘ЧҷЧқ ЧҗЧҷЧ ЧҳЧЁЧҗЧ§ЧҳЧҷЧ‘ЧҷЧҷЧқ Ч•ЧһЧ Ч’Ч Ч•Ч ЧҷЧқ ЧӨЧ•ЧўЧңЧҷЧқ.

They can then explore ROBLOX вҖ” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вҖ” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вҖңCapture the FlagвҖқ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аҘҮ аӨөаӨ№ аӨҡаӨІаӨЁаҘҮ-аӨ«аӨҝаӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜ аӨ—аӨ—аӨЁаӨҡаҘҒаӨӮаӨ¬аҘҖ аӨҮаӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ№аҘӢ, аӨҸаӨ• аӨҡаӨІаӨӨаӨҫ-аӨ«аӨҝаӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҮаӨІаҘҖаӨ•аҘүаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹаӨ° аӨ№аҘӢ, аӨҸаӨ• аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІ аӨӘаӨҝаӨЁаӨ¬аҘүаӨІ аӨ®аӨ¶аҘҖаӨЁ аӨ№аҘӢ, аӨҸаӨ• аӨ®аӨІаҘҚаӨҹаҘҖаӨӘаҘҚаӨІаҘҮаӨҜаӨ° "аӨ•аҘҲаӨӘаҘҚаӨҡаӨ° аӨҰ аӨ«аҘҚаӨІаҘҲаӨ—" аӨ—аҘҮаӨ® аӨ№аҘӢ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ”аӨ°, аӨ…аӨӯаҘҖ аӨӨаӨ• аӨ•аӨІаҘҚаӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨЁ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ—аӨҲ аӨ°аӨҡаӨЁаӨҫаҘӨ аӨҮаӨё аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘҮ аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨҡаҘҒаӨ…аӨІ аӨңаӨјаӨ®аҘҖаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҹаҘҒаӨ•аӨЎаӨјаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ•аҘҖаӨ®аӨӨ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨӯаӨҫаӨ— аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аӨ° аӨ”аӨ° аӨ¶аӨҫаӨЁаӨҰаӨҫаӨ° аӨҡаҘҖаӨңаӨјаҘҮаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨ•аӨ°, ROBLOX аӨёаӨҰаӨёаҘҚаӨҜ аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҮаӨ· аӨ¬аҘҲаӨң аӨ”аӨ° ROBLOX аӨЎаҘүаӨІаӨ° ("Robux") аӨ•аӨ®аӨҫ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ, аӨөаҘҮ аӨ‘аӨЁаӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҲаӨҹаӨІаҘүаӨ— аӨёаҘҮ аӨ…аӨөаӨӨаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨӘаӨЎаӨјаҘҮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҸаӨ•аҘҚаӨёаҘҮаӨёаӨ°аҘҖаӨңаӨј аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ-аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨ®аӨҝаӨҜаӨ® аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨЈ аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ, аӨҮаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аҘҲаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаӨҝаӨө аӨ•аӨӮаӨӘаҘӢаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨҹаҘҚаӨё аӨ”аӨ° аӨ•аӨҫаӨ® аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨ•аҘҮаӨЁаӨҝаӨңаӨјаҘҚаӨ® аӨ–аӨ°аҘҖаӨҰ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ

La sua particolaritГ  ГЁ che praticamente tutto su ROBLOX ГЁ progettato e costruito dai membri della community. Ogni giocatore inizia scegliendo un avatar e dandogli un'identitГ . PuГІ quindi esplorare ROBLOX, interagendo con gli altri tramite chat, giocando o collaborando a progetti creativi. Ogni giocatore riceve anche un proprio appezzamento di terreno virtuale non edificato, insieme a una cassetta degli attrezzi virtuale con cui progettare e costruire qualsiasi cosa: un grattacielo navigabile, un elicottero funzionante, un flipper gigante, un gioco multiplayer "Cattura la bandiera" o qualsiasi altra creazione ancora da immaginare. A loro volta, possono utilizzare questi Robux per acquistare abbigliamento e accessori per il proprio avatar, nonchГ© materiali da costruzione di alta qualitГ , componenti interattivi e meccanismi funzionanti dal catalogo online.

bn.title: аҰҶаҰ®аҰҝ аҰ•аҰҝ Zerox FF-аҰҸаҰ° аҰ—аҰҝаҰІа§ҚаҰЎ аҰІаҰҝаҰЎаҰҫаҰ° аҰ№аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°аҰ¬? рҹҳұ
bn.description:
аҰҶаҰ®аҰҝ аҰ•аҰҝ аҰңа§ҮаҰ°аҰ•а§ҚаҰё аҰҸаҰ«аҰҸаҰ«-аҰҸаҰ° аҰ—аҰҝаҰІа§ҚаҰЎ аҰІаҰҝаҰЎаҰҫаҰ° аҰ№аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°аҰ¬? рҹҳұ

аҰЁаҰ®аҰёа§ҚаҰ•аҰҫаҰ° аҰёаҰ¬аҰҫаҰҮаҰ•а§Ү! рҹҷҸ
аҰҶаҰ®аҰҝ аҰ¬аҰҝаҰЁаҰҫаҰҜаҰјаҰ•

рҹ“©аҰҜа§ӢаҰ—аҰҫаҰҜа§ӢаҰ—а§ҮаҰ° аҰңаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜ аҰҮаҰ®а§ҮаҰІ: binayakniroula24@gmail.com
рҹ“І аҰҸаҰЎаҰҝаҰҹаҰҝаҰӮ аҰёаҰ«аҰҹаҰ“аҰҜаҰја§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰ°: аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰҝаҰ®аҰҝаҰҜаҰјаҰҫаҰ° аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°а§Ӣ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰҶаҰ«аҰҹаҰҫаҰ° аҰҮаҰ«а§ҮаҰ•а§ҚаҰҹаҰё

вҳ…аҰ•аҰӘаҰҝаҰ°аҰҫаҰҮаҰҹ:
аҰҶаҰ®аҰ°аҰҫ аҰҜа§Ү аҰ•аҰҫаҰүаҰ•а§Ү аҰ°аҰҝаҰ…а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰ•аҰ¶аҰЁ аҰӯаҰҝаҰЎаҰҝаҰ“ аҰ¬аҰҫаҰЁаҰҫаҰЁа§ӢаҰ° аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰ®аҰӨаҰҝ аҰҰаҰҝаҰҮ, аҰ•аҰҝаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨа§Ғ аҰӯаҰҝаҰЎаҰҝаҰ“аҰҹаҰҝаҰ° аҰЎа§ҮаҰёаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҝаҰӘаҰ¶аҰЁ аҰ¬аҰ•а§ҚаҰёа§Ү аҰ…аҰ¬аҰ¶а§ҚаҰҜаҰҮ 'аҰҶаҰҮ аҰ…а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰ® аҰ¬аҰҝаҰЁаҰҫаҰҜаҰјаҰ•' (аҰҶаҰ®аҰҫаҰҰа§ҮаҰ° аҰҡа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁа§ҮаҰІа§ҮаҰ° аҰІаҰҝаҰҷа§ҚаҰ• аҰёаҰ№) аҰ¬а§ҚаҰ°а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰЎаҰҝаҰӮ аҰҘаҰҫаҰ•аҰӨа§Ү аҰ№аҰ¬а§ҮаҘӨ

вҳ…аҰ…а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰЎа§ҚаҰ°аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰЎ аҰҸаҰ®а§ҒаҰІа§ҮаҰҹаҰ°:
аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІа§Ғ аҰёа§ҚаҰҹа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰ•аҰё, аҰҸаҰ®аҰҸаҰёаҰҶаҰҮ

snippet.title: рқҗҒрқҗЎрқҗҡрқҗ«рқҗў рқҗҶрқҗ®рқҗҘрқҗ®рқҗ рқҗ®рқҗҘрқҗў рқҗ’рқҗ§рқҗҡрқҗ§рқҗҡ рқҗҸрқҗ®рқҗ§рқҗһрқҗў | New Snana Purnima Bhajan | а¬ӯа¬ҫа¬°а¬ҝ а¬—аӯҒа¬іаӯҒа¬—аӯҒа¬іа¬ҝ а¬ёаӯҚа¬Ёа¬ҫа¬Ё а¬ӘаӯҒа¬ЁаӯҮа¬Үа¬Ғ | рқҗҖрқҗқрқҗІрқҗҡ рқҗҖрқҗқрқҗ«рқҗўрқҗӨрқҗҡ
snippet.description:
а¬ёаӯҚа¬Ёа¬ҫа¬Ё а¬ӘаӯҒа¬°аӯҚа¬ЈаӯҚа¬Ја¬ҝа¬®а¬ҫа¬° а¬Ҹа¬№а¬ҝ а¬Әа¬¬а¬ҝа¬ӨаӯҚа¬° а¬…а¬¬а¬ёа¬°а¬°аӯҮ а¬•а¬ҫа¬іа¬ҝа¬Ҷ а¬ёа¬ҫа¬Ҷа¬ЁаӯҚа¬Өа¬ҷаӯҚа¬• а¬ҡа¬°а¬Ја¬ҫа¬°а¬¬а¬ҝа¬ЁаӯҚа¬Ұа¬°аӯҮ а¬Ҹа¬• а¬•аӯҚа¬·аӯҒа¬ҰаӯҚа¬° а¬ӯа¬•аӯҚа¬Өа¬ҝ а¬…а¬°аӯҚа¬ҳаӯҚаӯҹаҘӨ а¬ӯа¬ҫа¬°а¬ҝ а¬—аӯҒа¬іаӯҒа¬—аӯҒа¬іа¬ҝа¬° а¬ёаӯҮа¬Ү а¬—а¬№а¬іа¬ҝ а¬ӯа¬ҝа¬Өа¬°аӯҮ, а¬ёаӯҚа¬Ёа¬ҫа¬Ё а¬®а¬ЈаӯҚа¬Ўа¬Әа¬°аӯҮ а¬…а¬¬а¬ёаӯҚа¬Ҙа¬ҫа¬Әа¬ҝа¬Ө а¬ҡа¬•а¬ҫа¬Ёаӯҹа¬Ёа¬ҷаӯҚа¬•аӯҒ а¬ҰаӯҮа¬–а¬ҝ а¬ӯа¬•аӯҚа¬Өа¬° а¬®а¬Ёа¬°аӯҮ а¬үа¬ аӯҒа¬Ҙа¬ҝа¬¬а¬ҫ а¬ӘаӯҚа¬°а¬¶аӯҚа¬ЁвҖ” "а¬•а¬ҫа¬іа¬ҝа¬Ҷ а¬ӨаӯҒ а¬•аӯҮа¬®а¬ҝа¬Өа¬ҝа¬•а¬ҫ а¬ а¬ҫа¬•аӯҒа¬°"аҘӨ а¬•а¬ЈаӯҚа¬ а¬¶а¬ҝа¬іаӯҚа¬ӘаӯҖ а¬Ҷа¬ҰаӯҚаӯҹа¬ҫ а¬Ҷа¬ҰаӯҚа¬°а¬ҝа¬•а¬ҫ (Adya Adrika) а¬ҷаӯҚа¬• а¬ёаӯҒа¬®а¬§аӯҒа¬° а¬ёаӯҚаӯұа¬°а¬°аӯҮ а¬Ҹа¬№а¬ҝ а¬ӯа¬ңа¬Ёа¬ҹа¬ҝ а¬Ҷа¬Әа¬Ја¬ҷаӯҚа¬• а¬Ҷа¬–а¬ҝа¬°аӯҮ а¬ІаӯҒа¬№ а¬Ҹа¬¬а¬Ӯ а¬№аӯға¬Ұаӯҹа¬°аӯҮ а¬ӯа¬•аӯҚа¬Өа¬ҝа¬° а¬ңаӯҒа¬Ҷа¬° а¬ёаӯға¬·аӯҚа¬ҹа¬ҝ а¬•а¬°а¬ҝа¬¬аҘӨ

а¬Ҝа¬Ұа¬ҝ а¬Ҹа¬№а¬ҝ а¬ӯа¬ңа¬Ёа¬ҹа¬ҝ а¬Ҷа¬Әа¬Ја¬ҷаӯҚа¬• а¬®а¬Ёа¬•аӯҒ а¬ӣаӯҒа¬Үа¬Ға¬Ҙа¬ҫа¬Ҹ, а¬ӨаӯҮа¬¬аӯҮ а¬ӯа¬ҝа¬Ўа¬ҝа¬“а¬ҹа¬ҝа¬•аӯҒ Like а¬•а¬°а¬ЁаӯҚа¬ӨаӯҒ, Comment а¬°аӯҮ 'а¬ңаӯҹ а¬ңа¬—а¬ЁаӯҚа¬Ёа¬ҫа¬Ҙ' а¬ІаӯҮа¬–а¬ЁаӯҚа¬ӨаӯҒ а¬Ҹа¬¬а¬Ӯ а¬ҡаӯҚаӯҹа¬ҫа¬ЁаӯҮа¬ІаӯҚвҖҢа¬•аӯҒ Subscribe а¬•а¬°а¬ҝ а¬Ҷа¬® а¬ёа¬№ а¬ҜаӯӢа¬Ўа¬ја¬ҝ а¬№аӯӢа¬Ү а¬°аӯҒа¬№а¬ЁаӯҚа¬ӨаӯҒ

а¬ёаӯҚа¬Ёа¬ҫа¬Ё а¬ӘаӯҒа¬°аӯҚа¬ЈаӯҚа¬Ја¬ҝа¬®а¬ҫа¬° а¬Ҹа¬№а¬ҝ а¬Әа¬¬а¬ҝа¬ӨаӯҚа¬° а¬…а¬¬а¬ёа¬°а¬°аӯҮ а¬•а¬ҫа¬іа¬ҝа¬Ҷ а¬ёа¬ҫа¬Ҷа¬ЁаӯҚа¬Өа¬ҷаӯҚа¬• а¬ҡа¬°а¬Ја¬ҫа¬°а¬¬а¬ҝа¬ЁаӯҚа¬Ұа¬°аӯҮ а¬Ҹа¬• а¬•аӯҚа¬·аӯҒа¬ҰаӯҚа¬° а¬ӯа¬•аӯҚа¬Өа¬ҝ а¬…а¬°аӯҚа¬ҳаӯҚаӯҹаҘӨ а¬ӯа¬ҫа¬°а¬ҝ а¬—аӯҒа¬іаӯҒа¬—аӯҒа¬іа¬ҝа¬° а¬ёаӯҮа¬Ү а¬—а¬№а¬іа¬ҝ а¬ӯа¬ҝа¬Өа¬°аӯҮ, а¬ёаӯҚа¬Ёа¬ҫа¬Ё а¬®а¬ЈаӯҚа¬Ўа¬Әа¬°аӯҮ а¬…а¬¬а¬ёаӯҚа¬Ҙа¬ҫа¬Әа¬ҝа¬Ө а¬ҡа¬•а¬ҫа¬Ёаӯҹа¬Ёа¬ҷаӯҚа¬•аӯҒ а¬ҰаӯҮа¬–а¬ҝ а¬ӯа¬•аӯҚа¬Өа¬° а¬®а¬Ёа¬°аӯҮ а¬үа¬ аӯҒа¬Ҙа¬ҝа¬¬а¬ҫ а¬ӘаӯҚа¬°а¬¶аӯҚа¬ЁвҖ” "а¬•а¬ҫа¬іа¬ҝа¬Ҷ а¬ӨаӯҒ а¬•аӯҮа¬®а¬ҝа¬Өа¬ҝа¬•а¬ҫ а¬ а¬ҫа¬•аӯҒа¬°"аҘӨ а¬•а¬ЈаӯҚа¬ а¬¶а¬ҝа¬іаӯҚа¬ӘаӯҖ а¬Ҷа¬ҰаӯҚаӯҹа¬ҫ а¬Ҷа¬ҰаӯҚа¬°а¬ҝа¬•а¬ҫ (Adya Adrika) а¬ҷаӯҚа¬• а¬ёаӯҒа¬®а¬§аӯҒа¬° а¬ёаӯҚаӯұа¬°а¬°аӯҮ а¬Ҹа¬№а¬ҝ а¬ӯа¬ңа¬Ёа¬ҹа¬ҝ а¬Ҷа¬Әа¬Ја¬ҷаӯҚа¬• а¬Ҷа¬–а¬ҝа¬°аӯҮ а¬ІаӯҒа¬№ а¬Ҹа¬¬а¬Ӯ а¬№аӯға¬Ұаӯҹа¬°аӯҮ а¬ӯа¬•аӯҚа¬Өа¬ҝа¬° а¬ңаӯҒа¬Ҷа¬° а¬ёаӯға¬·аӯҚа¬ҹа¬ҝ а¬•а¬°а¬ҝа¬¬аҘӨ

а¬Ҝа¬Ұа¬ҝ а¬Ҹа¬№а¬ҝ а¬ӯа¬ңа¬Ёа¬ҹа¬ҝ а¬Ҷа¬Әа¬Ја¬ҷаӯҚа¬• а¬®а¬Ёа¬•аӯҒ а¬ӣаӯҒа¬Үа¬Ға¬Ҙа¬ҫа¬Ҹ, а¬ӨаӯҮа¬¬аӯҮ а¬ӯа¬ҝа¬Ўа¬ҝа¬“а¬ҹа¬ҝа¬•аӯҒ Like а¬•а¬°а¬ЁаӯҚа¬ӨаӯҒ, Comment а¬°аӯҮ 'а¬ңаӯҹ а¬ңа¬—а¬ЁаӯҚа¬Ёа¬ҫа¬Ҙ' а¬ІаӯҮа¬–а¬ЁаӯҚа¬ӨаӯҒ а¬Ҹа¬¬а¬Ӯ а¬ҡаӯҚаӯҹа¬ҫа¬ЁаӯҮа¬ІаӯҚвҖҢа¬•аӯҒ Subscribe а¬•а¬°а¬ҝ а¬Ҷа¬® а¬ёа¬№ а¬ҜаӯӢа¬Ўа¬ја¬ҝ а¬№аӯӢа¬Ү а¬°аӯҒа¬№а¬ЁаӯҚа¬ӨаӯҒ

snippet.title: Loorey - RAADA BAAN
snippet.description:
Raada baan 
Loorey
Prod by R.A.M. 


Raada baan вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ chup lagera 
Bhada haan.. x 2 

Bhanna man thena , tara naam nai  yasko mach*kne
Shanta basum bhanya, tara hasdai aayo mach*kne 
Mach*kne  pagal ja NTF sanga maths sikna ? 
Sundar thakuri , ke cha khabar ? Haa ch*kne
Chichya  ghaati chyaatinjel,
i aint backing bad business
Bitches getting slapped in here
Time ma ayish, myaach*kney,
I dont have to drag you here
Afai aaissh, fya fullaa
Tero lagi khyak hu ma 
Talai bhetna byaakul thiye
M*ji, fusi ko dalla, bhatti ma garcha halla
Sauni ko udhaaro  natiri japan faraaarr
Thaal ma maal ko dalla , 
Nadekha jail parlash ,
Jalaa tero ghar baar, ama laai garo parlaa
..m*jiвҖҰ ghamandi , randi hosh ta ,
Agyanta ko bandhi hosh ta 
Aija bhai mero dandi khosna , 
Bajauchu tero baja gandu jastai ghanti hosh ta 
Raka haina khanna na pako pada  hosh ta ,
Devendra ko duplicate , kasto chada hota 
Rada baan ,   bhada haan, 
Paara paan wala , paan bana japan ma 
Ja bhanja chuplagera kaan kana
Antf jastai plan bana,  soch m*ji jaam kata 
Loorey  dincha   aam sajaa
Bhann bhai aaam kata ? 
Balaju, jyatha, nuwakot,  ki cha tero naya hood
Bhetney bhaye aija bhai, bhandinchu ma kaha chu
Yadd cha m*ji , ke re f*ck manas ghale ??
Bhandai thiesh, ch*kne ani afai chiplish khale, 
Khale m*ji, nachalhai m*ji , feri rze aucha bhare

Runchey m*ji baccha,  sadhai pyar pyar pyar
Yasko thutoonoh ma thukam , bhane yaskai mukh ma ryaal ,
Nataki pataki pakhandi raka ji , 
Visa thapna paisa chaina, 
Aijo dinchu  talai sapati , 
Tara  bhan malai kaka ji, 
Nabhaye kansha mama ji 
Tero bau ko gau ko shahu ko bau ko naati paryo manas G, 
Tero dai ko dai ko dai ko dai lai, 
Rap sikauthiyo manas le
Tero bau  ko gau ko bihey ma , 
Rap hanthiyo , manas le 
Stiil  rap hancha , manas le
Cap lagai  manasick ,
facts jharcha , manas le 
Trap garcha manas le, 
Rag hancha manas le 
Fans bhancha jhaapad le 
prank hancha manas le ..
Dance jastai  jhapalish

snippet.title: 2026 PUBG MOBILE EVEREST SHOWDOWN Finals | Day 2 | Everest ko naya champion
snippet.description:
2026 PMES PUBG MOBILE EVEREST SHOWDOWN вҖ” Day 2 ko official broadcast ma tapaiharulai swagat cha! рҹ”Ҙ

Ultimate showdown ko aaja antim din! Top 16 teams haru Everest Showdown ko championship title ra glory ko lagi aafno sabai bhanda utkrista game khelna ready chan.

Yo 2-day grand event ma total 10 matches madhe aaja antim 5 action-packed matches hunechan, ra aaja ko khel pachi hami yo season ko naya champion paune chau!

Nepal ko  finest teams haru PMES ko yo grand stage ma collide huda, intense action, clutch moments, ra top-tier competitive PUBG MOBILE ko experience lina tayar hunuhos.

Esports history baneko live witness garnuhos.

LYRICS
Walk alone on a road last night
Met a man named Blue
He was lost in a diner light
I was lost there too
He offered me his window
He offered me his bed
I declined and held the line
And this is what he said

Dark days are coming
So the Bible says
YouвҖҷll see them running
When the sky turns red
I know thereвҖҷs something
I canвҖҷt put my finger on
Dark days are coming
So we owe this song
Oh...

Left alone in a hotel room
The night was turning cool
So bright in a diamond light
The angels cried and crooned
They offered me their vision
Of ghosts in every wall
I declined and held the line
And watched the angels fall

Dark days are coming
So the Bible says
YouвҖҷll see them running
When the sky turns red
I know thereвҖҷs something
I canвҖҷt put my finger on
Dark days are coming
So we Oh this song
Oh...

Wars and whores
And deadlines never met
Lores through doors
In bedtime stories read
What we were is over
And what we are is gone
When I look in your eyes
I donвҖҷt want to sing this song

Dark days are coming
So the Bible says
YouвҖҷll see them running
When the sky turns red
I know thereвҖҷs something
I canвҖҷt put my finger on
Dark days are coming
So we owe this song
Oh...
